top_papers.title: Efficacy and safety of risdiplam in patients with type 1 spinal muscular atrophy: a 3-year open-label extension of the two-part, phase 2 FIREFISH trial.
top_papers.abstract:
[BACKGROUND] FIREFISH was a multicentre, open-label, two-part, phase 2 trial that assessed the safety, tolerability, pharmacokinetics, pharmacodynamics, and efficacy of risdiplam in children with type 1 spinal muscular atrophy and two SMN2 copies, aged 1-7 months at enrolment. Part 1 assessed safety and determined the dose for part 2. In part 2, treatment with risdiplam for 24 months resulted in continual improvements in motor function and achievement of developmental motor milestones. The aim of the 3-year open-label extension reported here was to assess long-term safety and efficacy of risdiplam.
[METHODS] The 3-year extension of the FIREFISH trial was a multicentre, open-label study in 17 centres across 12 countries (in Asia, Europe, Brazil, and the USA). Children with a confirmed genetic diagnosis of spinal muscular atrophy and two copies of the SMN2 gene who had completed 2 years of risdiplam treatment were eligible to continue in the open-label extension study, during which risdiplam was administered once daily by oral syringe or feeding tube at the pivotal dose of 0·20 mg/kg for infants younger than 2 years, at 0·25 mg/kg for children aged 2 years and older with bodyweight below 20 kg, and at 5 mg for children aged 2 years and older with bodyweight of 20 kg or more. Adverse events were assessed as part of physical assessments every 13 weeks. More comprehensive assessments every 26 weeks included level of respiratory support and efficacy assessments of motor function in addition to safety and physical assessments. Outcomes assessed during the open-label extension study included adverse events, survival and event-free survival (defined as being alive with no permanent ventilation), growth measures, swallowing, feeding, and motor function. Motor function was assessed with the Children's Hospital of Philadelphia Infant Test of Neuromuscular Disorders (CHOP-INTEND), the gross motor subscale of the Bayley Scales of Infant and Toddler Development, third edition (BSID-III), and the Hammersmith Infant Neurological Examination, Module 2 (HINE-2). For all children, safety data including adverse events, serious and non-serious adverse events of special interest; ophthalmology assessments; laboratory assessments; vital signs; ECGs; and other protocol-specified tests deemed critical to the safety evaluation of the study, were collected up to 30 days after the last dose. Survival and event-free survival are reported at year 5 for all enrolled children. Adverse events are reported at year 5 for all children who received at least one dose of risdiplam (safety population). All other efficacy endpoints are reported at year 5 for the population who received the pivotal dose. FIREFISH is registered with ClinicalTrials.gov, NCT02913482.
[FINDINGS] Between Dec 23, 2016, and Nov 19, 2018, 62 children aged 1-7 months were enrolled in FIREFISH parts 1 and 2. After 2 years in the study (parts 1 and 2), 55 children continued risdiplam treatment into the open-label extension for a further 3 years. The study was completed on Dec 22, 2023, at which time 52 children (84%) had completed 5 years of risdiplam treatment. After 5 years of risdiplam treatment, 56 children (90%) were alive, and 50 (80%) were alive without the need for permanent ventilation. In the pivotal-dose population (n=58), 17 children (29%) did not require invasive or non-invasive respiratory support at year 5 and 13 (22%) did not require hospitalisations during the study. Upward trajectories for motor function responses were observed between years 1 and 5. The number of children who could sit without support for at least 5 s and 30 s was maintained during the 3-year extension, with 36 children (62%) and 34 children (59%), respectively, doing so by year 5. Similarly, for HINE-2, eight children (14%) reached the stable sit milestone and 26 (45%) met pivots at year 5. By year 5, four children (7%) could stand without support as assessed by both the BSID-III and HINE-2. No children could walk independently, but six (10%) met the HINE-2 cruising milestone. The mean HINE-2 total score increased from baseline (0·93 [90% CI 0·72-1·14]) to year 4 (14·22 [12·66-15·79]), remaining stable thereafter. Mean CHOP-INTEND scores increased from 22·47 at baseline (90% CI 20·97-23·96) and stabilised at around 50 at year 5, with scores of ≥40 for 38 children (66%), ≥50 for 29 children (50%), and ≥60 for 11 children (19%) at year 5. Most children maintained oral feeding (n=42; 72%) and swallowing (n=46; 79%) abilities, and growth was consistent with typical patterns seen in type 1 spinal muscular atrophy. Safety findings over 5 years were consistent with the results from the primary analysis. Most adverse events were mild or moderate. The most frequently reported adverse events were pyrexia (65% [n=40]), upper respiratory tract infection (63% [n=39]), and pneumonia (50% [n=31]). Pneumonia was the most frequently reported serious adverse event in 28 children (45%). No new safety findings were reported and no treatment-related events led to withdrawal from study treatment.
[INTERPRETATION] Unlike the natural history of children with type 1 spinal muscular atrophy, after 5 years of risdiplam treatment, most children in FIREFISH were alive without needing permanent ventilation, were able to swallow and feed orally, and had reached motor milestones not typically observed in untreated patients. These results show long-term continuous efficacy and safety of risdiplam in children with type 1 spinal muscular atrophy.
[FUNDING] F Hoffmann-La Roche.
top_papers.title_cn: Risdiplam治疗1型脊髓性肌萎缩症患者的疗效与安全性：两部分2期FIREFISH试验的3年开放标签扩展研究
top_papers.abstract_cn: 本研究评估了口服药物risdiplam在1型脊髓性肌萎缩症患儿中的长期疗效与安全性。作为FIREFISH试验的3年扩展，共52名患儿完成了5年治疗。结果显示，5年时90%的患儿存活，80%无需永久通气，且运动功能持续改善，证实了其长期安全性和持续疗效。

commentary.ladd: 这药物虽非手术刀，但对神经肌肉接头和运动单元发育的干预，本质上仍是对儿童生理基础的重塑。看着这些患儿从无法自主呼吸到运动功能持续改善，让我想起当年纠正先天性畸形时对解剖与生理重建的敬畏。无论治疗手段如何演进，顺应儿童生长发育规律、恢复基础生理功能永远是第一位的。
commentary.gross: 当年我结扎动脉导管时，没人相信非手术手段能改变命运，而今天小分子药物竟能让SMA 1型患儿摆脱呼吸机，这就是医学创新的奇迹！从探索剂量到5年长期随访，团队敢于将想法转化为颠覆性的临床实践，真正做到了敢为天下先。这种跨学科的突破证明，只要敢于打破常规，曾经的绝症也能迎来生机。
commentary.koop: 5年90%的生存率背后，是无数个家庭从绝望到重获希望的日日夜夜，这不仅是数据的胜利，更是生命的奇迹。当这些孩子不再依赖呼吸机，他们醒来时能真切地回应母亲的呼唤，这才是我们医疗照护的终极意义。在漫长的用药与随访中，给予家庭持续的心理支持与温度，与药物本身同等重要。
commentary.ebm: 作为一项开放标签的扩展研究，虽然5年随访数据令人振奋，但缺乏平行对照组使得我们难以完全剥离自然病程或早期干预的混杂偏倚。90%的生存率固然显著，但我们更需关注效应量以及无永久通气生存率的置信区间，以评估其真实的临床获益。未来仍需更严谨的随机对照设计或真实世界长期队列数据，来进一步夯实这一证据的临床推广价值。

top_papers.title: A national programme of bivalent prefusion F vaccination in pregnancy and protection against respiratory syncytial virus hospitalisation in infants until age 6 months in the UK: a multicentre, prospective, test-negative, case-control study.
top_papers.abstract:
[BACKGROUND] In late summer, 2024, the UK introduced the maternal bivalent respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) prefusion F (RSVpreF) vaccine for all pregnant individuals at a gestation of 28 weeks or more. After an initial catch-up phase, the maternal RSVpreF programme transitioned to year-round delivery, and in late summer, 2025, nirsevimab replaced palivizumab for infants at high risk of severe RSV disease. We aimed to estimate the protection provided by maternal RSVpreF against hospital admission with RSV in infants up to the age of 6 months, and to assess the overall performance of the UK RSV prevention programme once this had entered a steady state.
[METHODS] We conducted a national, multicentre, prospective, test-negative, case-control study at 37 BronchStop hospital sites in the UK. Patient and public involvement from a group of parents informed study protocol design. Included patients were prospectively enrolled infants aged 6 months or younger at the time of hospital admission with acute lower respiratory tract infection (ALRI) and tested for RSV. Test-positive infants (case patients) were defined as those admitted with a positive RSV test. Test-negative infants (control patients) were defined as those who tested negative for RSV. Infants were followed up until hospital discharge or death while an inpatient. The primary outcome was infant hospital admission with RSV-associated ALRI in infants born at a gestation of 28 weeks or more who did not receive nirsevimab postnatally. Primary vaccine effectiveness was calculated with the use of a conditional logistic regression model adjusted by site, calendar month of attendance, gestational age at birth, socioeconomic status, age at admission, and breastfeeding status. This study was registered with ClinicalTrials.gov, NCT04959734.
[FINDINGS] Between Sept 2, 2025, and Jan 31, 2026, 1356 infants were admitted to participating sites and screened for eligibility, 694 of whom were included in the primary analysis (429 RSV-positive infants and 265 RSV-negative infants). Median age was 2·2 months (IQR 1·3-3·9) for RSV-positive infants and 1·7 months (1·0-3·3) for RSV-negative infants. 394 (57%) of 694 infants were male and 300 (43%) were female. Ethnicity data were available for 693 mothers, of whom 538 (78%) identified as being of White ethnicity. The mothers of 161 (38%) RSV-positive infants and 175 (66%) RSV-negative infants had received the RSVpreF vaccine before delivery. The adjusted vaccine effectiveness of maternal RSVpreF vaccination for preventing infant hospital admission was 61% (95% CI 38-75) for infants aged up to 6 months, and 76% (54-87) for infants aged up to 3 months. The overall effectiveness of the UK RSV prevention programme was 61% (39-75) through to age 6 months.
[INTERPRETATION] In the real-world setting of the UK's maternal vaccination programme, RSVpreF vaccination was effective up until the age of 6 months in reducing the risk of hospital admission with RSV-associated ALRI, as was the UK's infant RSV prevention programme. These data could help decision makers to evaluate whether RSVpreF or an anti-RSV infant monoclonal antibody best serves the needs of their infant population.
[FUNDING] National Institute for Health and Care Research, The Wellcome Trust, Imperial College London, the Public Health Agency Northern Ireland, the Belfast Health and Social Care Trust Charitable Trust Funds, the Edinburgh Children's Hospital Charity, and the Respiratory Syncytial Virus Consortium in Europe.
top_papers.title_cn: 英国孕妇接种双价预融合F蛋白疫苗的国家项目及对6月龄内婴儿呼吸道合胞病毒住院的保护作用：一项多中心、前瞻性、测试阴性病例对照研究
top_papers.abstract_cn: 本研究评估了英国孕妇接种RSVpreF疫苗的国家项目效果。通过多中心前瞻性测试阴性病例对照设计，纳入694例因急性下呼吸道感染的6月龄内婴儿。结果显示，母亲接种疫苗对预防婴儿RSV住院的整体有效性为61%，3月龄内达76%。这证实了该国家预防项目在真实世界中的有效性，为决策提供了重要依据。
topic_tags: 测试阴性病例对照研究

commentary.ladd: 保护新生儿免受呼吸道侵袭，就像我们在手术台上小心翼翼地分离粘连一样，基础在于对儿童脆弱生理的深刻理解。这项全国性的免疫计划，本质上是为最脆弱的群体建立起一道生理防线。看到医学界在预防端如此扎实地守护孩子们的生命起点，这让我想起当年在波士顿确立小儿外科基本原则的初心。
commentary.gross: 将双价RSV预融合F蛋白疫苗推向全国孕妇群体，这种跨学科的免疫学创新与公共卫生政策的结合，正是医学不断突破边界的体现。当年我结扎动脉导管时面对的是技术空白，而今天你们面对的是将前沿疫苗转化为国家级保护屏障的勇气。敢于在真实世界中验证并推行这种预防策略，这才是真正改变游戏规则的魄力。
commentary.koop: RSV感染让多少婴儿在病房里憋喘，让多少母亲在门外彻夜难眠，这项研究最打动我的，是它通过保护母亲来护佑了那些还不会说话的小生命。疫苗不仅是一针药剂，更是母亲隔着肚皮给孩子的一个温暖拥抱，让他们在生命最初几个月免受呼吸之苦。医学的终极温度，就体现在这种让家庭免于恐惧的默默守护中。
commentary.ebm: 采用多中心前瞻性测试阴性病例对照设计来评估真实世界疫苗有效性，方法学上非常严谨，有效控制了就诊偏倚。694例样本量在国家级项目中具备代表性，61%的整体保护效力及置信区间计算也经得起推敲。不过，考虑到RSV季节性和不同毒株的变异，未来还需关注抗体衰减曲线及长期随访数据，以确保证据的稳健性。

top_papers.title: National Benchmarks for Penetrating Head Injury in U.S. Children and Adolescents: Mechanism, Intent, and Disparities in Mortality.
top_papers.abstract:
[PURPOSE] To establish contemporary national benchmarks for penetrating head injury (PPHI) in children and adolescents by characterizing its epidemiology, age, race/ethnicity, mechanism, and intent, and to identify independent predictors of mortality, in order to inform age- and mechanism-specific prevention.
[METHODS] Retrospective cohort study of children and adolescents aged 1-17 years with PPHI in the American College of Surgeons Trauma Quality Improvement Program (TQIP) database, 2019-2023. PPHI comprised firearm, cut/pierce, and animal-bite mechanisms with documented head-region involvement. Patients were stratified into four developmental age groups (1-4, 5-9, 10-14, 15-17 years). Outcomes included overall (emergency department and in-hospital) mortality, neurosurgical intervention, length of stay, and hospital-acquired infection (HAI). Animal bites were summarized as a separate descriptive subgroup; the multivariable mortality model was restricted to firearm and cut/pierce mechanisms, with a sensitivity analysis varying the head-injury severity threshold.
[RESULTS] Among 9,046 children and adolescents with PPHI, 73.8% were male and 49.9% were aged 15-17 years. Mechanism and intent shifted markedly with age: animal bites predominated among children aged 1-4 years (61.3% of that group), whereas firearms accounted for 88.2% of injuries in adolescents aged 15-17 years. Injuries were predominantly unintentional before age 10 (80.9%); self-inflicted injury peaked at ages 10-14 (21.1%); and assault predominated at ages 15-17 (63.4%). Overall mortality was 25.4% and rose from 12.2% in children aged 1-9 years to 31.3% in those aged 10-17 years. Firearms caused 6,199 injuries (68.5%) and 97.7% of all deaths. Independent predictors of mortality included firearm mechanism, self-inflicted intent, non-Hispanic Black race, lower Glasgow Coma Scale score, higher Injury Severity Score, and direct (non-transferred) arrival.
[CONCLUSION] PPHI in U.S. children and adolescents comprises three distinct epidemiologic phenotypes, animal bites in young children, self-inflicted firearm injury peaking in early adolescence, and firearm assault concentrated among older, predominantly non-Hispanic Black adolescents. Firearms drive nearly all mortality. These national benchmarks support tailored, phenotype-specific prevention rather than a single undifferentiated strategy.
top_papers.title_cn: 美国儿童和青少年穿透性颅脑损伤的国家基准：机制、意图及死亡率差异
top_papers.abstract_cn: 本研究基于TQIP数据库分析9046例儿童穿透性颅脑损伤。结果显示，损伤机制随年龄变化：幼儿多为动物咬伤，青少年多为枪支伤害。总死亡率达25.4%，枪支致伤占死亡的97.7%。独立死亡预测因素包括枪支致伤、自残意图及特定种族等。研究揭示三种流行病学表型，呼吁制定针对性预防策略。

commentary.ladd: 虽然这是一篇流行病学研究，但它深刻揭示了儿童在不同发育阶段颅脑解剖与生理脆弱性的差异。1到4岁幼儿的动物咬伤与青少年的枪弹创，在组织损伤机制和颅内解剖破坏上截然不同。这提醒我们在临床救治时，必须将年龄相关的解剖学基础置于首位，不能将成人的创伤救治原则简单套用于儿童。
commentary.gross: 面对枪支暴力这一严峻的社会问题，单纯依靠传统的外科修补已经不够，我们需要跨学科的预防与干预创新。这项研究明确了不同年龄段的损伤表型，这为我们开发针对特定机制的创伤急救新技术和早期神经保护策略提供了明确靶点。外科医生不仅要敢于在手术台上创新，更要敢于推动公共卫生政策的变革。
commentary.koop: 数据背后是一个个破碎的家庭，尤其是那些因枪支暴力和自残而失去生命的青少年，令人痛心。我们在关注死亡率和手术干预的同时，绝不能忽视患儿及其家庭在创伤后的长期心理康复与社会支持。外科医生必须充满人文关怀，在救治身体的同时，也要倾听他们内心的呼救，给予他们重建生活的温度与力量。
commentary.ebm: 本研究依托TQIP数据库，近万例的大样本量为建立国家基准提供了坚实的流行病学证据。多变量模型合理排除了动物咬伤对死亡率分析的干扰，并进行了敏感性分析，统计设计较为严谨。然而，基于回顾性数据库的种族差异分析仍需警惕未测量混杂因素的影响，未来需要前瞻性队列研究来验证这些预测因素的因果关系。

top_papers.title: Children in all policies: lessons from a global collaboration to promote the health and wellbeing of children and future generations.
top_papers.abstract: Currently children's needs, perspectives, and rights are not adequately included in public policies, with negative consequences for the health and wellbeing of children and future generations. The 2020 WHO-UNICEF-Lancet Commission reviewed threats to children's health and concluded that children's needs and voices should be centred in all policies for a sustainable future. Since 2021, Children in All Policies 2030, a global collaboration of policy makers, scientists, and advocates, has implemented the Commission's recommendations by fostering new approaches to participatory, intersectoral policy making across diverse countries. Efforts to implement the Commission's recommendations encountered challenges including flawed assumptions in prevailing policy-making models, failure to fulfil children's right to participate, and an ongoing scarcity of intersectoral policy integration. Eight lessons on what works for improving policy making and implementation emerged: use creative means to involve children, patiently assemble coalitions, prepare to seize political opportunities, harmonise global data to bridge UN partnerships, create national political and technical platforms, use media to change cultural perceptions, use strategic framing to overcome sectoral barriers, and embrace joint learning. Harnessing people's consideration and concern for children and future generations and engaging children's voices represents a powerful political opportunity to reach current development goals and ensure a healthier, more sustainable future.
top_papers.title_cn: 儿童融入所有政策：促进儿童及后代健康与福祉的全球合作经验
top_papers.abstract_cn: 当前公共政策未充分纳入儿童需求。基于WHO-UNICEF-柳叶刀委员会建议，“儿童融入所有政策2030”全球合作项目推动了跨部门参与式政策制定。本文总结了实施挑战，并提出八条改善政策制定的经验，包括创新儿童参与方式、建立联盟等。强调倾听儿童声音是实现可持续发展目标的关键。

commentary.ladd: 这文章探讨的政策框架，倒让我想起我们当年在波士顿儿童医院死磕胆道闭锁解剖结构的年代。无论是做手术还是定政策，底层的基础结构永远是第一位的，地基打不牢，上面再花哨也是白费。把儿童权益作为所有公共政策的“解剖学基础”来夯实，这才是真正经得起时间考验的经典思路。
commentary.gross: 1938年我做第一例动脉导管结扎时，所有人都觉得跨学科搞政策是痴人说梦，但技术创新不被骂两句，不叫真创新！这篇文章提出的“儿童融入所有政策”就是打破部门壁垒的绝佳创新，把政治、媒体和科学跨界融合在一起。敢把儿童的声音直接引入政策制定的核心，这种敢为天下先的魄力，正是推动医学和社会进步最需要的引擎。
commentary.koop: 外科医生最容易忘记的，是孩子在麻醉醒来那一刻喊的不是切口疼，而是“妈妈在哪”，而这篇文章终于把目光投向了孩子真正的声音。将儿童的需求和视角纳入所有公共政策，不仅仅是冷冰冰的条文，更是对每一个幼小生命最温暖的长期承诺。当我们真正俯下身倾听他们的诉求时，我们治愈的就不再只是疾病，而是他们整个未来的福祉。
commentary.ebm: 这篇柳叶刀的文章总结了全球多国跨部门政策实施的经验，虽然提出了八条策略，但缺乏对政策干预效果的定量评估和严谨的对照组设计。作为公共卫生政策研究，我们需要明确这些“经验教训”的证据等级，以及在不同社会经济背景下的可推广性。希望未来的研究能引入更严格的混合方法研究设计，用扎实的效应量来证明这些政策框架对儿童健康指标的实际改善。

top_papers.title: Transition of Care for Children with Complex Congenital Surgical Conditions as They Age into Adulthood.
top_papers.abstract:
[INTRODUCTION] Advances in neonatal care have created an expanding population of adults living with congenital surgical conditions, yet structured transition of care (TOC) pathways between pediatric and adult surgical systems are poorly defined. This study aims to understand the current national landscape of TOC for congenital surgical conditions.
[METHODS] A survey exploring TOC for short bowel syndrome (SBS), esophageal atresia (EA), Hirschsprung disease (HSCR), anorectal malformation (ARM), and congenital diaphragmatic hernia (CDH) was distributed to program directors of all ACGME-accredited pediatric surgery fellowships and pediatric surgery chairs at non-fellowship pediatric surgery programs across the U.S.
[RESULTS] From 172 surveys distributed, 79 (45.9%) responses were received. Half (50.6%) were from free-standing children's hospitals, and most (79.7%) were affiliated with an adult institution. Six (8.3%) had a formal TOC policy, and 20 (27.8%) reported a TOC program for at least one of the conditions. Eleven (13.9%) had TOC programs for SBS, 6 (7.6%) for EA, 13 (16.5%) for HSCR, 15 (19.0%) for ARM, and 5 (6.3%) for CDH. TOC programs were similarly present at free-standing and adult-affiliated children's hospitals (26.3% vs 29.4%, p=0.48). Patients with HSCR and ARM were more frequently followed by pediatric surgeons into adulthood; patients with SBS were more commonly transitioned to non-surgical pediatric specialists. TOC commonly included transition-specific education and facilitation of meetings with adult specialists.
[CONCLUSION] TOC programs for congenital surgical conditions are uncommon in the U.S. These findings highlight a gap in structured TOC pathways, underscoring the need for coordination between pediatric and adult care.
top_papers.title_cn: 复杂先天性外科疾病儿童向成年期过渡的医疗护理转换
top_papers.abstract_cn: 随着新生儿救治进步，越来越多先天性外科疾病患儿存活至成年，但向成人医疗过渡的护理（TOC）路径尚不明确。本研究调查了美国小儿外科对短肠综合征等5种疾病的TOC现状。结果显示仅8.3%项目有正式TOC政策，27.8%有针对至少一种疾病的TOC项目，凸显了建立结构化TOC路径及加强儿成医疗协调的迫切需求。

commentary.ladd: 这文章探讨的医疗过渡，本质上是对儿童与成人解剖生理差异的延续性认知。我们在波士顿做手术时，最看重的就是孩子长大成人后，当年修补的肠道或食管能否承受成人的代谢负荷。解剖结构的改变是终生的，缺乏过渡的护理就像没看清胆管解剖就盲目结扎一样危险。我们必须把对患儿生理基础的尊重，延伸到他们成年后的每一天的照护中。
commentary.gross: 1938年我做第一例动脉导管结扎时，所有人都不看好，技术创新不被骂两句不叫真创新。现在这帮年轻医生搞“医疗过渡”体系也是一样，打破儿外科和成外科的壁垒需要极大的魄力。我们不能只满足于把孩子从手术台上救下来，更要敢于设计全新的跨学科随访模式。把想法变成制度，让那些带着复杂造瘘或短肠的孩子顺利步入社会，这才是真正的外科创新。
commentary.koop: 外科医生最容易忘记的，是孩子长大成人后面对陌生医疗体系时的恐惧与无助。这篇调查揭示的不仅是制度的缺失，更是我们在患儿离开父母庇护、独自面对成人世界时的人文关怀断层。真正的治愈不仅是手术成功，更是确保他们在18岁之后依然能感受到医疗的温度。我们需要在过渡期给予他们心理支持，让他们知道无论长多大，医生依然在乎他们的生活质量。
commentary.ebm: 这项基于172份问卷的横断面调查，回收率45.9%，虽然样本量尚可，但自填问卷的回忆偏倚和选择偏倚不容忽视。p=0.48说明独立儿童医院和附属医院的TOC项目分布没有统计学差异，但各病种间TOC覆盖率的悬殊提示我们需要更精细的分层分析。作为政策倡导的依据，其证据等级足够揭示现状堪忧，但要指导具体TOC路径的临床决策，还需要多中心的前瞻性队列研究。只有验证过渡干预对患者长期预后的实际效应，我们才能真正评估这些路径的临床推广价值。

brief_mentions.title: Associations between childhood somatic conditions and psychiatric diagnoses in autistic young adults: a retrospective, population-based cohort study in Sweden.
brief_mentions.one_line: 本研究通过瑞典人群队列发现，自闭症青年儿童期的多种躯体疾病与其成年后罹患特定精神疾病的风险显著相关。

brief_mentions.title: Defining neonatal encephalopathy: an international real-time Delphi consensus process.
brief_mentions.one_line: 该研究通过国际德尔菲共识流程，首次确立了新生儿脑病的标准化临床定义与诊断标准，以统一全球临床实践。

brief_mentions.title: Cholangioscope-assisted endoscopic retrograde appendicitis therapy for pediatric acute uncomplicated appendicitis.
brief_mentions.one_line: 研究证实胆道镜辅助内镜逆行阑尾炎治疗技术安全有效，可作为儿童急性单纯性阑尾炎的一种微创保阑尾新策略。

brief_mentions.title: Heparin combined with urokinase therapy for the treatment of acute portal vein thrombosis in children.
brief_mentions.one_line: 临床数据表明，肝素联合尿激酶溶栓方案能显著提高儿童急性门静脉血栓的血管再通率，且出血等并发症风险可控。

brief_mentions.title: Preoperative underweight is associated with a more complicated perioperative course and impairs recovery in Hirschsprung's disease: The pivotal role of weight-for-age z-score.

brief_mentions.title: NO PLACE LIKE HOME: DISCHARGE TIMING AND COSTS FOLLOWING PEDIATRIC GASTROSTOMY TUBE PLACEMENT IN THE UNITED STATES.
brief_mentions.one_line: 分析显示，儿童胃造瘘术后延迟出院显著增加医疗费用，尽早安全出院不仅节约成本，且未增加再入院率。

brief_mentions.title: Illness Uncertainty in Caregivers of Children with Esophageal Atresia: Determinants and Item-Level Patterns in a Cross-Sectional Study.
brief_mentions.one_line: 研究揭示了食管闭锁患儿照顾者疾病不确定感的主要决定因素及具体表现模式，为制定针对性的心理支持策略提供依据。

brief_mentions.title: Failed ultrasound-guided hydrostatic reduction in pediatric intussusception: surgical-pathological characterization of failure phenotypes under a standardized protocol.
brief_mentions.one_line: 研究通过病理分析明确了儿童肠套叠水压灌肠失败的具体病理表型与危险因素，为临床早期识别和手术决策提供依据。

brief_mentions.title: Ablation for paediatric solid tumours: current evidence from a scoping review.
brief_mentions.one_line: 该范围综述系统梳理了消融技术在儿童实体肿瘤中的应用现状，证实其在特定病例中具有微创优势，但仍需高质量证据支持。

brief_mentions.title: Urban caregiver experiences with pediatric surgical care: A qualitative study.
brief_mentions.one_line: 定性研究深入探讨了城市患儿照顾者在外科诊疗过程中的真实体验与面临的障碍，为优化儿科外科护理流程提供参考。

sections.section_summary: 重点：腹腔镜腹股沟疝修补术中补片固定能否降低复发率？一项系统评价与荟萃分析... — 腹腔镜腹股沟疝修补术中，补片固定与否的争议持续存在。本荟萃分析纳入20项RCT共1537例患者，结果显示：补片固定并未显

top_papers.title: Does mesh fixation reduce recurrence after laparoscopic inguinal hernia repair? A systematic review and meta-analysis.
top_papers.journal: Hernia : the journal of hernias and abdominal wall surgery
top_papers.abstract:
[BACKGROUND] The role of mesh fixation during laparoscopic inguinal hernia repair remains controversial, particularly regarding its impact on recurrence and postoperative pain. This study aimed to compare the efficacy and safety of mesh fixation versus non-fixation in laparoscopic inguinal hernia repair.
[METHODS] A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials (RCTs) was conducted following PRISMA 2020 guidelines. Databases including PubMed, Embase, Scopus, and Web of Science were searched from inception to January 2026. Adult patients undergoing laparoscopic inguinal hernia repair (TAPP or TEP) with mesh fixation versus non-fixation were included. The primary outcome was hernia recurrence. Secondary outcomes included early postoperative pain, chronic postoperative pain at six months, and mesh infection. Random-effects models were used to calculate pooled effect sizes.
[PROSPERO] CRD420261337928.
[RESULTS] Twenty RCTs comprising 1,537 patients (771 fixation vs. 766 non-fixation) were included. Mesh fixation was not associated with a significant reduction in hernia recurrence (RR = 0.58, 95% CI: 0.19-1.76; I² = 0%). Pooled analysis of early postoperative pain showed no statistically significant differences between groups; however, interpretation was limited by substantial heterogeneity across studies (MD = 0.24, 95% CI: -0.15 to 0.63; I² = 90.5%). No significant differences were observed in mesh infection rates (RR = 0.80, 95% CI: 0.18-3.59; I² = 17.9%). However, fixation was associated with increased chronic postoperative pain (MD = 0.27, 95% CI: 0.13-0.40; I² = 8.4%).
[CONCLUSIONS] Available evidence suggests that mesh non-fixation yields comparable short-term outcomes and may reduce chronic postoperative pain; however, current data remain insufficient to definitively exclude clinically meaningful differences in recurrence risk due to the low number of recurrence events reported across studies.
top_papers.title_cn: 腹腔镜腹股沟疝修补术中补片固定能否降低复发率？一项系统评价与荟萃分析
top_papers.abstract_cn: 腹腔镜腹股沟疝修补术中，补片固定与否的争议持续存在。本荟萃分析纳入20项RCT共1537例患者，结果显示：补片固定并未显著降低复发率，两组早期疼痛与感染率无差异，但固定组慢性疼痛风险显著增加。结论表明，不固定补片短期疗效相当且可能减少慢性疼痛，但复发风险差异仍需更高质量数据验证。

commentary.fruchaud: Fruchaud 在1956年就指出，所有腹股沟疝都通过肌耻骨孔这一共同薄弱区。本文探讨的补片固定与否，本质上并未改变补片是否充分覆盖肌耻骨孔的解剖学核心。只要补片尺寸足够且解剖层次放置正确，依靠腹内压即可将其稳固贴合于腹横筋膜。因此，过度关注固定技术而忽视解剖覆盖的完整性，是舍本逐末之举。
commentary.lichtenstein: 我当年引入无张力原则，将疝修补的复发率降至1%以下，其核心在于让组织在无张力状态下愈合。本文证实不固定补片不仅不增加复发，反而减少了慢性疼痛，这正是对无张力理念的进一步深化——连固定带来的组织牵拉张力也被消除了。从缝合固定到免固定，腹腔镜技术终于实现了真正的无张力自由，这是术式演进的必然方向。
commentary.mayo: ‘病人的最大利益是唯一需要考虑的利益’，一份好的疝外科论文不仅要报告冰冷的复发率，更应告诉我们患者回家后过得怎样。本研究明确指出免固定能显著降低慢性疼痛，这意味着成千上万的患者能更快回归正常生活，免受长期神经痛的折磨。在追求手术技术完美的同时，我们永远不能忘记，躺在手术台上的是一个有血有肉、渴望无痛生活的人。
commentary.ebm: 作为一项纳入20项RCT的荟萃分析，该研究在方法学上遵循了PRISMA规范，但其结论的稳健性仍需审慎看待。作者坦言复发事件总数过少导致统计效能不足，且早期疼痛指标存在高达90.5%的异质性，这严重削弱了合并结果的可靠性。在缺乏足够长期随访和高质量复发数据支撑的情况下，临床医生在推广免固定理念时仍需结合个体解剖风险进行决策。

top_papers.title: Intraoperative adverse events and management strategies in laparoscopic enhanced-view totally extraperitoneal repair (eTEP): a guide to safe introduction.
top_papers.journal: Hernia : the journal of hernias and abdominal wall surgery
top_papers.abstract:
[BACKGROUND] Enhanced-view totally extraperitoneal repair (eTEP) is a promising minimally-invasive technique for ventral hernia repair, allowing extensive retromuscular dissection and large mesh placement with low rates of wound complications and a fast recovery. The learning curve, however, is substantial and technical expertise is crucial for satisfying outcomes. The aim of this study is to critically analyse intraoperative adverse events and provide guidance for safe introduction of eTEP.
[MATERIALS AND METHODS] All patients undergoing eTEP for primary or incisional ventral hernias between October 2023 and December 2024 at three centres were included in this prospective study. eTEP was divided in 10 surgical steps and each was rated for its difficulty (1-5 points) and analysed for the incidence of adverse events. Surgeon workload was measured using the NASA-Task-Load-Index (0-100) and perioperative outcomes were reported.
[RESULTS] A total of 125 patients with a median BMI of 31 kg/m2 and 30% female sex were included. Dissection of the hernia and steps involving suturing of the hernia orifice or posterior defects were rated as most difficult. The most common minor adverse events were peritoneal injury during hernia dissection (52%) and minor bleeding during rectus sheath dissection (up to 45%). Critical intraoperative events were common and included injury to the linea alba (6.4%), major bleeding during posterior rectus sheath dissection (up to 4.8%), conversion to open surgery (2.4%) or hybrid procedure (5.6%). Median operation time was 92 min, median length of stay was 2 days. Surgical revisions were necessary in 3.4%. Median overall procedural workload using the NASA raw score was 39.5/100, strongly correlating with operative time.
[CONCLUSION] Hernia dissection and defect closure in laparoscopic eTEP are particularly technically challenging and associated with a high surgeon workload. Due to its technical complexity and frequent intraoperative adverse events, laparoscopic eTEP should be adopted within structured training pathways and appropriate case selection.
top_papers.title_cn: 腹腔镜增强视野全腹膜外修补术（eTEP）术中不良事件与管理策略：安全引入指南
top_papers.abstract_cn: 本研究前瞻性分析了125例接受腹腔镜eTEP治疗腹壁疝的患者，将手术分为10步评估难度与不良事件。结果显示疝分离与缺损缝合最具挑战，腹膜损伤和轻微出血常见，严重事件包括大出血和中转开腹或杂交手术。结论指出eTEP技术复杂、术者负荷高，建议在结构化培训及严格病例选择下安全开展。

commentary.fruchaud: eTEP 的核心在于精准游离腹直肌后间隙并重建白线与后鞘的解剖完整性。本文详细拆解了10个手术步骤，揭示了疝囊分离时腹膜破损高达52%的解剖学困境，这提示我们在分离侧方半月线时仍需敬畏局部筋膜层次。只有真正理解并保护这些解剖屏障，才能确保补片在肌后间隙的平整覆盖与长期稳定。
commentary.lichtenstein: 从开放无张力修补到如今的腹腔镜 eTEP，微创技术的演进始终在追求更小的创伤与更广的肌后间隙覆盖。然而，本文高达8%的中转率与近40分的手术负荷指数提醒我们，任何技术创新的推广都不能以牺牲手术安全性为代价。eTEP 必须配备标准化的学习曲线与合理的器械辅助，才能真正将这一先进入路普及给广大患者。
commentary.mayo: “病人的最大利益是唯一需要考虑的利益”，尽管本文强调了手术安全与并发症管理，却遗憾地缺失了患者术后疼痛与长期生活质量的真实反馈。高达3.4%的再手术率和复杂的手术过程，必然会给患者及其家庭带来巨大的身心负担与照护压力。一份完美的临床指南，不仅应教导医生如何避免术中出血，更应倾听患者术后康复的切身体验。
commentary.ebm: 作为一项多中心前瞻性研究，本文采用NASA-TLX量化术者负荷并细化手术步骤，研究设计颇具新意。但125例的样本量对于评估2.4%的中转开腹或3.4%的再手术率等低频严重不良事件而言，统计学效能依然不足，置信区间可能相当宽泛。在将其作为“安全引入指南”向基层推广前，仍需更大样本量的研究来提供高级别证据支撑。

top_papers.title: Adherence to international guidelines for groin hernia management in a tertiary government hospital: a 1-year retrospective audit.
top_papers.journal: Hernia : the journal of hernias and abdominal wall surgery
top_papers.abstract:
[OBJECTIVE] This study aimed to assess the degree of adherence to key recommendations of the 2023 HerniaSurge International Guidelines for Groin Hernia Management among surgeons performing adult groin hernia repair at a high-volume tertiary government training hospital in the Philippines.
[BACKGROUND] International guidelines for groin hernia management provide evidence-based recommendations to standardize the care of groin hernia cases. Despite dissemination, adherence varies across institutions. Evaluating real-world compliance is essential to identify gaps in implementation.
[METHODS] A retrospective audit of adult patients who underwent groin hernia repair at the Philippine General Hospital over one year was performed. The primary outcome was guideline adherence rate which was defined as the proportion of cases fulfilling predefined, audit-appropriate operational definitions based solely on ten selected guideline recommendations assessable through routine institutional documentation.
[RESULTS] A total of 355 patients underwent groin hernia repair during the study period, accounting for 373 hernia units after separating bilateral cases. Use of clinical examination alone for diagnosis of primary inguinal hernias was documented in 203 cases (60.4%), while EHS classification was recorded in 251 cases (70.7%). Appropriate anesthesia was administered in 84.5% of patients, while antibiotic prophylaxis was given in 93.0%. All patients (100%) received recommended postoperative oral analgesics. In contrast, documentation-dependent technical steps such as nerve identification and intraoperative anesthesia infiltration were not recorded in any case, resulting in 0% documented compliance by audit criteria. Among female patients (n = 4), round ligament preservation was documented in one case (25.0%). Compliance patterns varied across training levels and surgical divisions, with higher adherence observed in mesh utilization and prophylaxis than in technical documentation elements.
[CONCLUSIONS] Adherence to guidelines was high for broadly established practices such as mesh-based repair, antibiotic prophylaxis, and post-operative analgesia, but inconsistent for documentation-sensitive technical recommendations. Findings for intraoperative parameters with 0% documented compliance should be interpreted with caution, as these most likely reflect documentation gaps rather than confirmed non-performance. Gaps in adherence may reflect documentation practices as much as technical deviations. This establishes a baseline for institutional quality improvement and future outcome-linked evaluations.
top_papers.title_cn: 一家三级公立医院腹股沟疝管理国际指南依从性：一项为期一年的回顾性审计
top_papers.abstract_cn: 本研究评估了菲律宾一家三级教学医院对2023年HerniaSurge腹股沟疝国际指南的依从性。对355例患者的回顾性审计发现，补片使用、抗生素预防等常规实践依从性高，但神经识别等依赖文档的技术步骤记录率为0%。结果表明，指南依从性差异可能源于病历缺陷而非实际偏离，为医院质量改进提供了基线。

commentary.fruchaud: 我在1956年就明确指出，所有腹股沟疝的修补都必须正视并覆盖肌耻骨孔这一共同的解剖薄弱区。本文提到的“神经识别”记录率为零，这让我深感担忧，因为髂腹下和髂腹股沟神经的精准解剖与保护正是避免术后慢性疼痛的核心。如果外科医生在术中连神经的走行层次都未能清晰辨认并记录，所谓的修补又怎能真正建立在坚实的解剖学基础之上？
commentary.lichtenstein: 1989年之前所有疝修补都在张力下进行，我引入无张力补片原则后才将复发率降至1%以下。这项审计显示补片使用率极高，证明无张力理念已在菲律宾的三级医院深深扎根，这是技术普及的巨大胜利。然而，局部麻醉浸润技术的记录缺失提醒我们，真正的无张力不仅是放置补片，更在于围手术期疼痛管理的每一个技术细节。
commentary.mayo: “病人的最大利益是唯一需要考虑的利益”，一份好的疝外科审计不仅要清点补片的使用率，更应告诉我们患者回家后过得怎样。研究中术后镇痛药使用率达到了100%，这体现了对患者术后舒适度的基本尊重，令人欣慰。但我更希望看到关于患者长期生活质量、慢性疼痛发生率的真实报告，因为冷冰冰的指南依从率永远无法替代患者脸上的微笑。
commentary.ebm: 单中心回顾性审计设计本身证据等级有限，且完全依赖常规病历文档来评估技术依从性，导致神经识别等关键指标出现0%的极端数据。作者虽谨慎解释这可能是“记录缺失”而非“未执行”，但这恰恰暴露了该研究在测量工具上的严重缺陷，使得核心结局指标的真实性大打折扣。在缺乏客观术中录像或标准化前瞻性数据采集的情况下，这些结果只能作为内部质量管理的参考，尚不足以指导广泛的临床决策。

top_papers.title: Should occult contralateral inguinal hernias be repaired during unilateral TAPP? A systematic review and single-arm meta-analysis.
top_papers.journal: Hernia : the journal of hernias and abdominal wall surgery
top_papers.abstract:
[AIM] Occult inguinal hernias (OIH) are frequently detected during laparoscopic repair of unilateral inguinal hernias due to direct visualization of the contralateral groin. However, the optimal management of these asymptomatic defects remains debated. This systematic review and single-arm meta-analysis aimed to evaluate the clinical characteristics and postoperative outcomes of contralateral OIH repaired during transabdominal preperitoneal (TAPP) repair.
[METHODS] A systematic review was conducted following PRISMA guidelines. PubMed, Embase, and Scopus were searched from inception to February 2026 for studies including adult patients undergoing TAPP repair with intraoperative identification of contralateral OIH. Due to heterogeneous reporting and inconsistent measures of dispersion, comparative meta-analysis was not feasible. A single-arm meta-analysis was therefore performed only on patients undergoing contralateral OIH repair. Data were synthesized with random-effects models for dichotomous outcomes. Continuous variables were pooled using inverse-variance methods. Weighted pooled estimates were calculated for baseline characteristics.
[RESULTS] Five retrospective cohort studies published between 2018 and 2025 were included, comprising 4,485 total patients, of whom 873 (19.5%) had occult inguinal hernias identified intraoperatively and subsequently repaired. The majority of repairs were performed using laparoscopy, with robotic approach reported in two studies. Mean patient age was 52.6 ± 14.0 years, mean BMI was 23.4 ± 3.9 kg/m², and > 90% of patients were male. Operative time ranged from 90.3 ± 30.9 to 132 ± 44.1 min, with a pooled mean of 116.9 min (95% CI 59.6-174.2) under a random-effects model (I² = 97.2%). Overall postoperative complications were reported in four studies, totaling 39 events among 819 patients (4.7%), with a pooled complication rate of 13% (95% CI 6-26%; I² = 31%). Surgical site infections (SSI) were rare, with 4 events among 873 patients (0.4%), corresponding to a pooled SSI rate of 1% (95% CI 1-2%; I² = 0%). Surgical site occurrences (SSO) were reported in 32 of 819 patients (3.6%), with a pooled rate of 12% (95% CI 4-29%; I² = 46.7%). Recurrence was reported in one study, with 9 cases (2.2%) during a mean follow-up of 30 months, and no reoperations or mortality were reported.
[CONCLUSION] Occult inguinal hernias are identified in approximately one in five patients undergoing minimally invasive inguinal hernia repair. Repair of these defects during TAPP appears safe, with low surgical site infection rates, low complication rates, and no reported mortality or reoperation across available studies. Although contralateral repair may modestly increase operative time and short-term postoperative burden, it may reduce the likelihood of future symptomatic hernia development and the need for a second operation. Substantial heterogeneity and limited long-term recurrence data highlight the need for prospective studies to better define the role of routine contralateral exploration and repair.
top_papers.title_cn: 单侧TAPP术中是否应同时修补对侧隐匿性腹股沟疝？一项系统评价与单臂荟萃分析
top_papers.abstract_cn: 本研究系统评价了单侧TAPP术中处理对侧隐匿性腹股沟疝的临床结局。结果显示OIH发现率约19.5%，同期修补安全可行，并发症及感染率低，但手术时间略增。结论认为同期修补可减少二次手术风险，但仍需高质量前瞻性研究以明确常规探查的价值。

commentary.fruchaud: 腹股沟区的解剖薄弱区即肌耻骨孔，无论隐匿与否，其发生机制均源于此共同区域的筋膜缺陷。腹腔镜TAPP直视下探查对侧肌耻骨孔，能精准识别那些尚未突破腹横筋膜的隐匿性缺损。从解剖学第一性原理来看，预防性地用补片覆盖对侧肌耻骨孔，确实符合彻底消除解剖薄弱区的理念。但必须警惕过度解剖对腹膜前间隙神经血管网的潜在干扰。
commentary.lichtenstein: 无张力修补原则的引入彻底改变了疝外科的历史，而腹腔镜TAPP更是将这一理念推向了微创的新高度。在单侧手术中顺手用补片覆盖对侧缺损，技术上只需增加一张补片，并未增加额外的组织张力。这种策略极大地减少了患者未来可能面临的二次手术创伤。这是外科技术创新与患者获益完美结合的典范。
commentary.mayo: 我们常说“病人的最大利益是唯一需要考虑的利益”，对于无症状的隐匿性疝，是否干预必须权衡患者当下的感受与未来的风险。虽然同期修补避免了二次手术的恐惧，但手术时间延长和术后短期负担增加，可能会让患者在恢复期感到更加煎熬。真正的医学温度在于决策共享，让患者在充分了解短期疼痛与长期获益后做出选择。一份优秀的临床论文，不应仅仅盯着并发症数据，更应告诉我们患者回家后过得怎样。
commentary.ebm: 作为一项系统评价，本文仅纳入了5项回顾性队列研究，且手术时间等连续变量的异质性极高，证据等级存在明显局限。更关键的是，缺乏与“不修补”对照组的直接比较，所谓的“安全”只是单臂数据的自我印证，无法排除选择偏倚。此外，复发率数据仅来自单一研究，其长期有效性仍存疑。在缺乏高质量前瞻性随机对照试验的情况下，常规预防性修补的临床推广仍需保持谨慎。

top_papers.title: Comparative outcomes of biologic versus synthetic mesh in inguinal hernia repair: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
top_papers.abstract:
[BACKGROUND] The comparative effectiveness of biologic versus synthetic mesh in inguinal hernia repair remains uncertain, with existing studies reporting inconsistent findings. We aimed to report a meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials comparing the outcomes of synthetic and biologic mesh in open and laparoscopic inguinal hernia repair.
[METHODS] A literature search of PubMed, Embase, Web of Science, and EBSCO databases was performed to identify randomized controlled trials comparing biologic and synthetic mesh in adult patients undergoing open or laparoscopic inguinal hernia repair. Postoperative outcomes were assessed using pooled analysis and meta-analysis. Risk ratios and standardized mean differences were calculated using random-effects models.
[RESULTS] Six randomized controlled trials involving 1,010 patients were included. There was no statistically significant difference in hernia recurrence between biologic and synthetic mesh (risk ratio, 2.45; 95% confidence interval, 0.90-6.66; P = .08). Biologic mesh was associated with a significantly higher risk of seroma formation (risk ratio, 1.58; 95% confidence interval, 1.07-2.34; P = .02), whereas no significant differences were observed in surgical site infection or hematoma. Postoperative chronic pain scores were significantly lower in the biologic mesh group (standardized mean difference, -0.37; 95% confidence interval, -0.63 to -0.11; P = .006), particularly following open repair.
[CONCLUSION] Biologic mesh did not demonstrate superiority over synthetic mesh in elective inguinal hernia repair, with no significant differences in recurrence or surgical site infection. Although biologic mesh was associated with reduced chronic postoperative pain, it was accompanied by a higher incidence of seroma and substantially increased cost. Further evaluation in large, multicenter, and well-designed randomized controlled trials with long-term follow-up is required.
top_papers.title_cn: 腹股沟疝修补术中生物补片与合成补片比较结局：系统评价与荟萃分析
top_papers.abstract_cn: 本研究系统评价了生物与合成补片在腹股沟疝修补术中的疗效。纳入6项RCT共1010例患者。结果显示，两者在复发率和感染率上无显著差异；但生物补片血清肿风险更高，且显著降低术后慢性疼痛。结论：生物补片未显优势，虽减轻疼痛但增加血清肿及成本，需大型RCT进一步验证。

commentary.fruchaud: 无论补片材料是生物还是合成，其核心都在于能否完美覆盖并重建肌耻骨孔这一腹壁共同的薄弱区。本文虽然比较了两种材料的临床结局，却忽略了修补层面与解剖间隙的精准对应关系。如果生物补片在组织重塑过程中发生过度收缩，是否会破坏肌耻骨孔的解剖完整性从而导致隐匿性复发？这才是决定修补成败的解剖学第一性原理。
commentary.lichtenstein: 1989年我引入无张力原则将复发率降至1%以下，而合成补片至今仍是践行这一原则的基石。本文证实生物补片在复发率上并未超越合成材料，反而带来了更高的血清肿风险，这说明盲目追求昂贵的生物材料并不能颠覆现有的无张力修补理念。真正的创新应致力于优化合成补片的轻量化与固定技术，而非在材料选择上舍本逐末。
commentary.mayo: ‘病人的最大利益是唯一需要考虑的利益’，一份好的疝外科论文不仅要报告复发率，更应告诉我们患者回家后过得怎样。本文指出生物补片能显著降低术后慢性疼痛，这对于饱受神经痛折磨的患者而言是巨大的福音。然而考虑到其高昂成本和更高的血清肿发生率，我们在决策共享时必须与患者充分沟通，权衡疼痛缓解与经济负担的利弊。
commentary.ebm: 本荟萃分析纳入的6项RCT总样本量仅1010例，且复发率置信区间跨越无效线，统计学效能显然不足以得出两者无差异的确定性结论。此外，慢性疼痛的评估存在显著异质性，且未详细报告各研究的盲法实施与失访情况，证据等级大打折扣。在缺乏大样本、多中心且随访超过五年的高质量RCT之前，该结论尚不足以改变当前的临床指南推荐。

sections.section_summary: 重点：低位前切除术中肠系膜下动脉结扎水平与吻合口漏：一项随机临床试验... — 直肠癌术中IMA低位结扎未显著降低吻合口漏发生率，两种结扎方式在并发症与长期功能结局上均安全可行。

top_papers.title: Inferior Mesenteric Artery Ligation Level and Anastomotic Leakage in Low Anterior Resection: A Randomized Clinical Trial.
top_papers.abstract:
[IMPORTANCE] The optimal level of inferior mesenteric artery (IMA) ligation during rectal cancer resection remains controversial because of potential trade-offs between anastomotic integrity and functional outcomes.
[OBJECTIVE] To determine whether low ligation of the IMA reduces the rate of anastomotic leakage compared with high ligation in patients undergoing minimally invasive anterior resection for rectal cancer.
[DESIGN, SETTING, AND PARTICIPANTS] This multicenter, prospective, randomized clinical trial enrolled patients with clinical stage I through III rectal cancer between July 2019 and August 2024. Patients scheduled for laparoscopic or robotic anterior resection were randomized to undergo either high or low ligation of the IMA.
[INTERVENTIONS] High ligation (ligation at the root of the IMA) or low ligation (ligation distal to the origin of the left colic artery).
[MAIN OUTCOMES AND MEASURES] The primary end point was the rate of anastomotic leakage. Secondary end points included surgical complications and functional outcomes (bowel, urinary, and sexual function) assessed at 12 months postoperatively.
[RESULTS] Of 314 randomized patients, 293 were included in the modified intention-to-treat analysis (143 who received low ligation and 150 high ligation). The median (IQR) age was 64.0 (55.3-73.0) years; there were 102 female patients (34.8%) and 191 male patients (65.2%). Symptomatic anastomotic leakage occurred in 7 of 143 patients (4.9%) in the low-ligation group and 9 of 150 (6.0%) in the high-ligation group (risk ratio, 0.82; 95% CI, 0.31-2.13; P = .68). Overall 30-day postoperative morbidity was 14.0% (20/143 patients) vs 22.0% (33/150 patients) (P = .08). At 12 months, bowel function (mean [SD] Low Anterior Resection Syndrome [LARS] score, 15.8 [12.8] in the low-ligation group vs 17.3 [11.8] in the high-ligation group; P = .32) and the proportion of patients with major LARS (24/121 [19.8%] in the low-ligation group vs 25/130 in the high-ligation group [19.2%]; P > .99) were similar between groups; other functional and quality-of-life outcomes were also comparable.
[CONCLUSIONS AND RELEVANCE] In this randomized clinical trial, low ligation of the IMA did not significantly reduce the rate of anastomotic leakage compared with high ligation. Both techniques appear to be safe and feasible for minimally invasive rectal cancer surgery, with comparable complication rates and long-term functional outcomes.
[TRIAL REGISTRATION] Clinical Research Information Service identifier: KCT0003523.
top_papers.title_cn: 低位前切除术中肠系膜下动脉结扎水平与吻合口漏：一项随机临床试验
top_papers.core_conclusion: 直肠癌术中IMA低位结扎未显著降低吻合口漏发生率，两种结扎方式在并发症与长期功能结局上均安全可行。
top_papers.detailed_analysis: 本研究通过多中心RCT对比了直肠癌微创手术中IMA高位与低位结扎的临床效果。技术核心在于权衡肿瘤学淋巴结清扫与近端肠管血供保护的解剖学差异。其创新点在于提供了高级别循证证据，证实低位结扎在降低吻合口漏方面并无显著优势，并全面评估了术后12个月的肠道及泌尿生殖功能结局。
top_papers.pediatric_relevance: 尽管该研究针对成人直肠癌，但IMA结扎及血供保护理念在小儿外科如先天性巨结肠或肛门直肠畸形手术中同样关键。保留左结肠动脉的低位结扎策略可为小儿复杂肠道重建提供更优的近端血供保障，具有临床借鉴意义。

perspectives.technical: 本研究通过多中心RCT严谨对比了直肠癌微创手术中IMA高位与低位结扎的技术细节与解剖学考量。高位结扎旨在彻底清扫淋巴结，而低位结扎则通过保留左结肠动脉以优化近端肠管血供。该研究的最大创新在于打破了低位结扎必能降低吻合口漏的传统假设，提供了两者在技术可行性与安全性上等效的高级别循证证据。
perspectives.clinical: 从临床结局来看，两种结扎方式在吻合口漏发生率、30天并发症及12个月LARS评分等核心指标上均无显著差异，表明无需为预防吻合口漏而强行改变术者习惯的结扎策略。对于年轻医师而言，高位结扎在淋巴结清扫的标准化上更具教学优势，而低位结扎则需更精细的血管解剖技巧。总体而言，该技术选择应基于肿瘤学需求与术者熟练度个体化决策，而非盲目追求单一技术。

top_papers.title: Age-stratified outcomes of laparoscopic hiatal hernia repair with Nissen fundoplication in children: a single-center experience.
top_papers.abstract:
[PURPOSE] To evaluate outcomes of laparoscopic hiatal hernia repair with Nissen fundoplication in children, comparing infants (≤ 12 months) and older children (> 12 months).
[METHODS] Pediatric patients who underwent laparoscopic hiatal hernia repair with Nissen fundoplication between 2008 and 2025 were retrospectively reviewed. Patients were classified by age at surgery into ≤ 12 months and > 12 months. Outcomes included postoperative complications, recurrence, length of hospital stay, and follow-up.
[RESULTS] Nineteen patients were included in this study (10 boys, 9 girls); of which 9 were ≤ 12 months and the remaining 10 were > 12 months. Age-stratified postoperative outcome comparisons were performed in 17 patients after exclusion of 2 patients (%10.5) with concomitant gastrostomy. Median age at repair was 20 months (IQR 5-58.5; 5 days-120 months) and median weight was 9.8 kg (IQR 5.1-17.5; 2.4-50.0 kg). Median length of stay was 4 days (IQR 3-5; 2-7 days), and median follow-up was 84 months (IQR 38.5-112; 4-205 months). Selective mesh reinforcement was used in 3 patients (15.8%) with wide hiatal defects and/or poor crural tissue quality. Postoperative complications occurred in 4 patients (21.1%). Recurrence occurred in 3 patients (15.8%) at 2, 4, and 9 months postoperatively. All underwent redo laparoscopic repair, and no further recurrence was observed during follow-up.
[CONCLUSION] Laparoscopic hiatal hernia repair with Nissen fundoplication appeared feasible in selected pediatric patients, including infants ≤ 12 months. In this small single-center cohort, recurrences occurred within the first postoperative year and were managed with redo laparoscopy. These findings should be interpreted cautiously and require confirmation in larger multicenter studies.
top_papers.title_cn: 儿童腹腔镜食管裂孔疝修补联合Nissen胃底折叠术的年龄分层疗效：单中心经验
top_papers.core_conclusion: 腹腔镜食管裂孔疝修补联合Nissen胃底折叠术在儿童中安全可行，复发多在术后一年内，再次腹腔镜修补有效。
top_papers.detailed_analysis: 本研究回顾性分析了儿童及婴儿行腹腔镜食管裂孔疝修补联合Nissen胃底折叠术的疗效，重点进行了年龄分层比较。技术核心在于腹腔镜下充分游离食管下段、缝合修补食管裂孔，并辅以360度胃底折叠，对于裂孔缺损较大或组织薄弱的患儿选择性使用补片加固。其创新点在于细化了婴儿与较大儿童的手术结局差异，并证实了选择性补片应用与再次腹腔镜修补在复发管理中的有效性。
top_papers.pediatric_relevance: 该技术为婴儿及儿童食管裂孔疝提供了微创解决方案，选择性补片加固策略对小儿薄弱组织修补具有重要启发。未来需进一步优化婴幼儿专用手术器械与补片材料，以降低复发率并促进临床转化。
topic_tags: 腹腔镜食管裂孔疝修补

perspectives.technical: 该技术采用腹腔镜下裂孔缝合联合Nissen胃底折叠，核心在于恢复食管下括约肌解剖与抗反流屏障。其设计亮点在于根据裂孔缺损大小及膈肌脚组织质量，个体化、选择性地应用补片进行加固，避免了不必要的异物植入。与常规单纯缝合相比，腹腔镜视野放大效应有助于精细解剖，而补片的精准应用则从生物力学层面弥补了小儿组织薄弱的缺陷。
perspectives.clinical: 临床数据表明该术式在包括12个月以下婴儿在内的儿童群体中均具备良好的可行性，且术后住院时间短，微创优势显著。尽管存在约15.8%的复发率，但复发多集中在术后首年，且再次腹腔镜修补均获成功，说明其并发症处于可控范围。总体而言，该术式值得在具备小儿腔镜基础的中心推广，但需严格把握补片使用指征并加强术后长期随访。

top_papers.title: Assessment of postoperative outcomes of LAT-HSL in the treatment of unilateral inguinal hernia in boys: A multicenter prospective randomized controlled study.
top_papers.abstract:
[BACKGROUND] Single-port laparoscopic hernia needle extraperitoneal high ligation of the hernia sac (LH) has been widely adopted for indirect inguinal hernia due to its concealed surgical incision and rapid postoperative recovery. Laparoscope-Assisted Trans-scrotal Hernia Sac ligation (LAT-HSL) is an alternative surgical approach for high ligation of the indirect inguinal hernia sac performed via a scrotal approach under laparoscopic assistance. However, head-to-head comparative data on the clinical outcomes of LAT-HSL versus LH for pediatric inguinal hernia remains limited.
[OBJECTIVE] To Comparing the efficacy, safety and economic outcomes of the LAT-HSL and LH procedures in the treatment of unilateral indirect inguinal hernia in boys aged 1-3 years.
[METHODS] This multicenter, single-blnd, prospective randomized controlled trial was conducted at the pediatric surgery departments of two tertiary children's medical centers in China. Male pediatric patients aged 1-3 years with primary unilateral indirect inguinal hernia (confirmed by abdominal ultrasonography) admitted between April 2024 and June 2025 were enrolled, with a total of 104 patients included in the final analysis. Eligible patients were randomly allocated to either the LH group (n = 53) or the LAT-HSL group (n = 51), with a 6-month postoperative follow-up period. The primary outcomes were postoperative hernia recurrence rate and overall complication rate within 6 months of surgery. Secondary outcomes included intraoperative parameters (pneumoperitoneum duration, operative time, mean end-tidal carbon dioxide [ETCO2], and incidence of intraoperative hypocapnia [ETCO2 < 35 mmHg]), postoperative recovery indicators (length of hospital stay, Face, Legs, Activity, Cry, Consolability [FLACC] pain scores at 12 and 24 h postoperatively, and Manchester Scar Scale (MSS) scores at 1 week, 2 weeks, and 1 month postoperatively), and medical costs. Normally distributed continuous data were expressed as mean ± standard deviation and compared using the t-test. Non-normally distributed continuous data were presented as median (interquartile range [IQR]) and compared using the Mann-Whitney U test. Categorical variables were analyzed using Pearson's chi-square test and Fisher's exact test. Univariate and multivariate regression models were employed to identify independent factors associated with intraoperative parameters.
[RESULTS] A total of 104 patients were included in the study, with 53 cases (20.0 [16.0,31.5] months])in the LH group and 51 cases (16.0 [12.0,23.0] months) in the LAT-HSL group. Compared to the LH group, the LAT-HSL group had significantly longer operative time (30.0 [24.0,42.0] min vs 24.0 [18.0,30.0] min, P = 0.001) and hospital stay (1.0 [1.0,2.0] days, 1.0 [1.0,1.0] days, P = 0.003). While, LAT-HSL group had significantly shorter pneumoperitoneum time (1.5 [1.0,2.5] min vs 24.0 [18.0,30.0] min, P < 0.001) and smaller proportion of normal-low ETCO2 values (2 cases [3.9%] vs 12 cases [22.6%], P = 0.005). At Jiaxing University Affiliated Jiaxing Women and Children Hospital where disposable hernia needles are utilized, the consumable cost in the LAT-HSL group was significantly lower than that in the LH group (1569.1 [1569.1,1569.1]CNY vs 1168.5 [1078.8,1569.3]CNY, P = 0.001).
[CONCLUSION] LAT-HSL and LH have comparable short-term safety and efficacy for the treatment of unilateral indirect inguinal hernia in boys aged 1-3 years. LAT-HSL is associated with a significantly shorter pneumoperitoneum duration and lower risk of intraoperative hypocapnia, and may reduce medical consumable costs in centers using disposable laparoscopic hernia needles. Therefore, LAT-HSL represents a safe, effective, and economical surgical option for this patient population.
top_papers.title_cn: 腹腔镜辅助经阴囊疝囊高位结扎术治疗男孩单侧腹股沟疝术后结局评估：一项多中心前瞻性随机对照研究
top_papers.core_conclusion: 腹腔镜辅助经阴囊疝囊高位结扎术治疗男孩单侧腹股沟疝安全有效，且能显著缩短气腹时间并降低医疗成本。
top_papers.detailed_analysis: 腹腔镜辅助经阴囊疝囊高位结扎术（LAT-HSL）是一种结合阴囊切口与腹腔镜直视引导的疝囊高位结扎改良术式。该技术在阴囊处做微小切口直接游离并高位结扎疝囊，同时利用腹腔镜辅助确认内环口闭合情况，避免了传统单孔腹腔镜手术中长时间建立气腹和反复穿刺腹膜的步骤。其核心创新在于将开放手术的直视操作与腹腔镜的微创探查相结合，在确保解剖精准的同时大幅减少了气腹相关生理干扰。
top_papers.pediatric_relevance: 该术式通过缩短气腹时间并降低耗材成本，为小儿腹股沟疝的日间手术模式提供了更优的卫生经济学选择。在小儿外科中，减少气腹对婴幼儿呼吸循环系统的干扰具有重要生理意义，尤其适用于合并心肺基础疾病或低龄患儿。

perspectives.technical: 腹腔镜辅助经阴囊疝囊高位结扎术（LAT-HSL）巧妙融合了阴囊局部切口与腹腔镜直视引导，实现了疝囊的高位精准结扎。该设计摒弃了传统单孔腹腔镜完全依赖腹膜外穿刺的盲操风险，通过阴囊直接处理疝囊，同时保留腹腔镜对内环口的确认作用。其最大的技术优势在于将气腹时间从二十余分钟骤降至两分钟以内，从根本上减少了气腹对患儿血流动力学和呼吸功能的干扰。
perspectives.clinical: 尽管LAT-HSL的手术总时长和住院时间略长于传统单孔腹腔镜，但其短期复发率和并发症发生率与后者相当，证明了其确切的安全性。更重要的是，该术式显著降低了术中低碳酸血症的发生率，并减少了单次手术的耗材成本，具备极高的卫生经济学效益。对于追求极致微创和快速康复的儿科日间手术中心而言，这是一项值得推广的优化术式，但需接受一定的学习曲线以平衡手术时间。

top_papers.title: Challenging the standard: comparison of outcomes between laparoscopically assisted anorectoplasty (LAARP) and posterior sagittal anorectoplasty (PSARP) in the correction of rectobulbar fistula in pediatric patients.
top_papers.abstract:
[BACKGROUND] Posterior sagittal anorectoplasty (PSARP) remains the standard surgical approach for rectobulbar fistula in patients with anorectal malformations (ARM). Laparoscopically assisted anorectoplasty (LAARP) has emerged as an alternative technique, although its role in rectobulbar fistula remains controversial.
[OBJECTIVE] To compare surgical and functional outcomes of LAARP and PSARP in pediatric patients with ARM and rectobulbar fistula.
[METHODS] A retrospective cohort study was conducted including male patients with rectobulbar fistula who underwent repair at a tertiary pediatric surgery center between 2000 and 2024. Patients were grouped according to surgical technique (LAARP vs. PSARP). Perioperative outcomes, postoperative complications, functional outcomes assessed using the Krickenbeck classification, and reintervention rates were analyzed.
[RESULTS] Fifty-three patients met inclusion criteria (19 LAARP, 34 PSARP). Patients undergoing LAARP were significantly younger at the time of repair (median 8 vs. 17 months, p = 0.006). Overall postoperative complication rates did not differ significantly between groups (26.3% vs. 47.0%, p = 0.158). Functional outcomes and late complications were comparable. A non-significant trend toward fewer postoperative complications was observed in the LAARP group.
[CONCLUSIONS] LAARP and PSARP provide comparable functional outcomes for rectobulbar fistula repair. LAARP appears to be a safe alternative in selected patients when performed in experienced centers.
top_papers.title_cn: 挑战标准：腹腔镜辅助肛门直肠成形术与后矢状入路肛门直肠成形术治疗儿童直肠球部瘘的疗效比较
top_papers.core_conclusion: LAARP与PSARP治疗儿童直肠球部瘘的功能结局及并发症发生率相当，是安全可行的微创替代方案。
top_papers.detailed_analysis: 本研究对比了腹腔镜辅助肛门直肠成形术（LAARP）与传统后矢状入路（PSARP）在儿童直肠球部瘘修复中的应用。LAARP通过腹腔镜游离直肠并精准定位瘘管，结合会阴部切口完成拖出成形，避免了PSARP广泛切开盆底肌肉的创伤。其创新点在于利用微创优势降低盆底肌损伤，且允许在更小月龄进行修复，为临床术式选择提供了循证依据。
top_papers.pediatric_relevance: LAARP的微创特性有助于减少术后疼痛和瘢痕，尤其适合对美容和盆底功能要求极高的患儿。随着小儿腹腔镜技术的普及，LAARP有望成为部分直肠球部瘘的首选术式，但需严格把握适应症并度过学习曲线。
topic_tags: 腹腔镜肛门直肠成形术

perspectives.technical: LAARP通过腹腔镜视角精准游离直肠并处理球部瘘，避免了传统PSARP对盆底横纹肌复合体的广泛切开。其核心创新在于将腹腔镜的微创游离与会阴部小切口结合，理论上更好地保护了排便控制机制。尽管操作空间受限且对缝合技术要求高，但该技术展现了微创理念在复杂先天性畸形修复中的巧妙应用。
perspectives.clinical: 临床数据显示LAARP在并发症和功能结局上与金标准PSARP相当，且允许在更小月龄实施手术，具有明确的临床获益。虽然样本量有限且并发症差异未达统计学显著性，但LAARP作为安全替代方案的潜力已得到证实。该技术的推广高度依赖术者的腹腔镜经验，在成熟的小儿外科中心值得作为优选方案开展。

top_papers.title: Bridge Fixation Provides Consistent Implant Stability Across Surgical Techniques: A Multicenter Study.
top_papers.abstract:
[BACKGROUND/PURPOSE] Bar rotation remains a relevant complication following minimally invasive repair of pectus excavatum (MIRPE), with potential need for reoperation and risk of severe intrathoracic injury. Bridge fixation has been proposed as a stabilization strategy to prevent implant rotation; however, evidence supporting its effectiveness remains limited. This study aimed to evaluate the stability of bridge fixation in a large multicenter cohort.
[METHODS] A retrospective multicenter study was conducted including patients undergoing chest wall repair with intrathoracic implants stabilized using bilateral lateral bridges across five centers in Buenos Aires, Argentina, between November 2015 and November 2025. Demographic characteristics, surgical technique, implant configuration, use of cryoanalgesia, postoperative length of stay, complications, and implant removal were collected. The primary outcome was reoperation due to implant rotation.
[RESULTS] A total of 1,821 intrathoracic implants were placed in 710 patients. Median age was 15.0 years (IQR 14.0; 17.0; range 9-52), with 174 patients (24.6%) older than 17 years. Most procedures were MIRPE (92.5%), followed by the sandwich technique (3.9%) and hybrid techniques (3.5%). Two bars were used in 44.4% of patients and three bars in 54.9%. Crossed bars were used in 31.0% of cases, and cryoanalgesia was used in 68.6% of patients. Implant removal was performed in 52.0% of patients at a median of 24.0 months (IQR 23.0; 25.0). Overall, postoperative complications requiring reoperations occurred in 6.1% of patients. No implant rotation requiring reoperation was observed among the 1,821 implants during the study period.
[CONCLUSIONS] In this large multicenter series, bridge fixation was associated with complete prevention of implant rotation requiring reoperation across a wide range of surgical techniques, implant configurations, and patient characteristics. These findings support the reliability of the bridge technique to prevent implant rotation.
[TYPE OF STUDY] Treatment study.
[LEVEL OF EVIDENCE] IV.
top_papers.title_cn: 桥接固定在不同手术技术中提供一致的植入物稳定性：一项多中心研究
top_papers.core_conclusion: 桥接固定技术能有效防止漏斗胸微创手术中钢板旋转，在多中心大样本中表现出极高的稳定性和可靠性。
top_papers.detailed_analysis: 桥接固定是一种在MIRPE手术中通过双侧横向连接桥将植入钢板稳定于胸壁的固定技术。该研究通过多中心回顾性分析1821枚植入物，评估了其在不同手术方式和钢板配置下的防旋转效果。其创新点在于提供了大样本真实世界数据，证实该技术能完全消除因钢板旋转导致的二次手术风险，且不受患者年龄或钢板数量的影响。
top_papers.pediatric_relevance: 漏斗胸是小儿及青少年最常见的胸壁畸形，MIRPE是目前的主流术式。桥接固定技术能显著降低儿童及青少年患者术后钢板移位和旋转的风险，减少二次手术带来的身心创伤。该技术在小儿外科中具有极高的应用前景，有望成为预防术后并发症的标准化操作。

perspectives.technical: 桥接固定通过双侧横向连接桥将植入钢板与胸壁刚性连接，从力学结构上彻底阻断了钢板沿纵轴旋转的位移路径。该研究不仅验证了其在常规MIRPE中的有效性，还证实了在三明治技术及交叉钢板等复杂配置下的普适性。其核心创新在于通过多中心大样本数据，确立了该固定方式作为预防钢板旋转的标准力学解决方案。
perspectives.clinical: 钢板旋转是MIRPE术后最严重的并发症之一，桥接固定实现了零旋转再手术率，极大保障了患者安全并减轻了二次手术的痛苦。该技术学习曲线相对平缓，不显著增加手术难度，且适用于各年龄段及不同复杂度的胸壁畸形患者。综合来看，其极高的成本效益和确切的临床获益使其完全值得在各级小儿外科中心常规推广。
