sections.section_summary: 重点：基于人工智能代理的自主生物医学研究... — 研究开发了通用生物医学AI代理Biomni，能自主执行从数据分析到湿实验的完整科研流程，大幅加速生物医学发现。

top_papers.title: Autonomous biomedical research with an artificial intelligence agent.
top_papers.abstract: Biomedical research is increasingly constrained by repetitive, fragmented workflows that slow discovery. We introduce Biomni, a general-purpose biomedical artificial intelligence agent that autonomously executes diverse research tasks. To map the biomedical action space, Biomni's action-discovery agent mines tools, databases, and protocols from thousands of publications across 25 domains, building a unified agentic environment. Its general-purpose architecture integrates large language model reasoning with retrieval-augmented planning and code-based execution, dynamically composing workflows without predefined templates. Systematic benchmarking shows strong generalization across heterogeneous tasks-causal gene prioritization, drug repurposing, rare-disease diagnosis, microbiome analysis, and molecular cloning-without task-specific tuning. Real-world case studies demonstrate Biomni interpreting multi-modal datasets, optimizing protein stability, orchestrating wet-lab instruments, and generating experimentally testable protocols. Biomni envisions artificial intelligence augmenting human scientists and accelerating discovery.
top_papers.title_cn: 基于人工智能代理的自主生物医学研究
top_papers.core_conclusion: 研究开发了通用生物医学AI代理Biomni，能自主执行从数据分析到湿实验的完整科研流程，大幅加速生物医学发现。
top_papers.detailed_analysis: 该研究推出了通用生物医学AI代理Biomni，通过自动挖掘文献中的工具与协议构建统一操作环境。它结合了大模型推理与代码执行能力，无需预设模板即可动态生成工作流，在基因排序、罕见病诊断等任务中展现出强大的泛化能力。更重要的是，Biomni能直接协调湿实验仪器并生成可执行的实验方案，标志着AI从辅助分析向自主科研的重大跨越。
top_papers.clinical_insight: 对于小儿外科等临床医生而言，这类自主AI代理未来可自动整合临床队列数据与基础实验，加速罕见先天性畸形致病基因的发现。它有望将医生从繁琐的文献检索和初步数据清洗中解放出来，直接提供经过验证的转化医学方案。

perspectives.clinical: 这项技术最打动临床医生的是它能自己设计并执行实验，未来遇到疑难罕见病时，AI能直接帮我们跑完从基因筛查到细胞验证的全套流程。这不仅能大幅缩短确诊和寻找靶向药的时间，还能让临床医生把精力真正回归到患者诊疗上。长远来看，这种全自动科研助手将极大降低临床医生开展转化研究的门槛，让更多好想法快速变成能治病的新方案。
perspectives.trend: 从辅助分析到自主执行是AI医疗的必然趋势，Biomni在Science的发表标志着AI Agent在生物医学领域的工程化落地已跨过关键门槛。目前该技术仍处于实验室验证阶段，距离医院常规部署还需解决湿实验硬件兼容性和数据合规问题。未来两到三年，随着多模态大模型与自动化实验室的深度融合，这类自主代理将率先在药企和顶尖科研院所重塑研发格局。

top_papers.title: Membrane protein solubilization and structure determination using de novo-designed proteins.
top_papers.abstract: Developing therapies and vaccines against integral membrane proteins is hindered by their extensive hydrophobic surfaces, which complicate production and structural analysis. Here, we describe a general deep learning-based design approach for solubilizing native membrane proteins while preserving their sequence, fold, active-site, and ligand-binding properties. Genetically encoded de novo protein WRAPs [water-soluble RFdiffused amphipathic proteins] surround the lipid-interacting hydrophobic surfaces, rendering them thermostable and water-soluble without the need for detergents. We design WRAPs for both monomeric and oligomeric beta-barrel outer membrane proteins and helical multipass transmembrane proteins. A 2.95-angstrom-resolution cryo-electron microscopy structure of WRAPed mycobacterial porin demonstrates that WRAPs can be used for the structural determination of membrane proteins in solution. As a step toward syphilis vaccine development, we generated soluble versions of Treponema pallidum antigens.
top_papers.title_cn: 利用从头设计蛋白质进行膜蛋白增溶与结构测定
top_papers.core_conclusion: 深度学习设计的WRAPs蛋白无需去污剂即可增溶膜蛋白并解析其高分辨率结构，大幅加速靶向药物与疫苗研发。
top_papers.detailed_analysis: 研究团队利用深度学习从头设计了一种名为WRAPs的新型两亲蛋白，能够包裹膜蛋白的疏水表面，使其在无需去污剂的情况下实现水溶和热稳定。该技术成功应用于多种膜蛋白，并解析了分枝杆菌孔蛋白的2.95埃冷冻电镜高分辨率结构。此外，研究还制备了梅毒螺旋体抗原的可溶性版本，为相关疫苗开发提供了新工具。这一突破解决了膜蛋白难以提取和结构解析的长期痛点，为靶向膜蛋白的药物和疫苗设计奠定了坚实基础。
top_papers.clinical_insight: 膜蛋白是众多药物的靶点，该技术让原本难以研究的膜蛋白结构变得触手可及，极大降低了结构生物学研究的门槛。对于小儿外科及儿科临床而言，这有望加速针对儿童特有感染或罕见遗传病中膜蛋白靶点的精准药物研发，缩短从基础研究到临床转化的周期。

perspectives.clinical: 膜蛋白是绝大多数药物的靶点，但过去提取和研究它们极其困难，常需使用可能破坏蛋白结构的去污剂。这项技术让膜蛋白在自然状态下保持水溶和稳定，临床医生能借此获得更真实的靶点结构信息。这将直接加速针对复杂感染和罕见病的精准靶向药物与疫苗研发，让患者更快用上特效药。
perspectives.trend: 结合深度学习的蛋白质从头设计正迎来爆发期，该技术将AI设计从理论推向了真实的冷冻电镜结构解析，证明了其极高的可靠性。未来2-3年，这种“AI设计+结构生物学”的组合将成为创新药和疫苗研发的标配，大幅缩短研发周期。行业格局上，掌握核心AI蛋白设计算法和结构解析闭环的机构将主导下一代生物药的源头创新。

top_papers.title: A sub-10-millisecond neural dynamical system based on phase-change memristors.
top_papers.abstract: High-fidelity geometry for physical-world modeling demands real-time, dense, and differentiable deformation fields on manifolds. Neural dynamical systems (NDSs) using adaptive stepsize integration with embedded neural networks excel at these tasks but still suffer latency on the order of hundreds of milliseconds. In this work, we report a sub-10-millisecond NDS hardware leveraging the precisely controlled conductance drift of phase-change memristors and their multilevel compute-in-memory capabilities. We fabricated a 40-nanometer NDS chip for the challenging surface reconstruction tasks. Compared with state-of-the-art NDS hardware, our NDS design achieves a latency of 2.12 milliseconds (below 10 milliseconds) for single-iteration NDS computations with an error tolerance of 10-7 and delivers 3.82× to 36.27× faster speed while consuming 11.75× to 24.73× less power. The end-to-end NDS latency through hardware measurements and simulations outperformed graphics processing unit A100 by 50.38× to 478.18×.
top_papers.title_cn: 基于相变忆阻器的亚10毫秒神经动力学系统
top_papers.core_conclusion: 基于相变忆阻器的亚10毫秒神经动力学芯片，在物理建模中实现超低延迟与极低功耗的存算一体计算。
top_papers.detailed_analysis: 该研究针对物理世界建模中实时密集形变场计算延迟高的问题，利用相变忆阻器精确控制电导漂移和多级存算一体能力，制造了40纳米神经动力学系统芯片。在表面重建任务中，该芯片单次迭代延迟仅2.12毫秒，比现有最快硬件提速数倍至数十倍，且功耗大幅降低。其端到端计算速度较顶级GPU提升50至478倍，为复杂物理场的高保真实时模拟提供了革命性的底层硬件支持。
top_papers.clinical_insight: 尽管这是底层算力芯片突破，但其物理世界建模能力对小儿外科意义重大，可应用于复杂先心病的实时三维血流动力学模拟及术中软组织形变预测。这种毫秒级的动态渲染与计算将直接赋能手术机器人触觉反馈，推动小儿外科数字孪生手术导航的临床落地。

perspectives.clinical: 这项底层算力突破意味着未来的手术导航和医学影像三维重建将彻底告别卡顿，实现真正的毫秒级实时交互。对于小儿外科手术而言，它能让术中软组织形变预测和复杂解剖结构的动态渲染变得极其流畅，直接提升手术操作精度与安全性。其展现的超低延迟和极低功耗，也为未来开发便携式实时医疗监测与术中边缘计算设备打下了坚实基础。
perspectives.trend: 存算一体架构正打破传统算力瓶颈，该研究证明了相变忆阻器在复杂微分方程求解上的巨大潜力，标志着神经动力学硬件向实用化迈出关键一步。未来两三年内，这类超低延迟芯片有望从物理模拟和边缘计算领域率先落地，并逐步向医疗边缘设备渗透。随着材料稳定性提升，它将成为驱动医疗数字孪生和具身智能手术机器人的核心物理引擎，重塑行业格局。

top_papers.title: Deep learning-enabled discovery of antibiotics effective against Neisseria gonorrhoeae.
top_papers.abstract: Neisseria gonorrhoeae is a common Gram-negative pathogen with increasing resistance to all recommended antibiotics. There is a critical need to improve the efficiency of the antibiotic hit discovery process to replenish the drug development pipeline. Here, we show that deep learning models can augment high-throughput screens to identify readily available molecules with narrow-spectrum activity against difficult-to-treat strains of N. gonorrhoeae. We phenotypically tested 38,650 small molecules for N. gonorrhoeae growth inhibition to train a predictive graph neural network (GNN) model. We benchmarked the model's performance against other architectures, including a large language model, and found that GNNs more accurately identify active, drug-like molecules that are structurally distinct from the training set and known antibiotics. Using the model to virtually screen ~6 million compounds, we identified 213 compounds for experimental validation and found that 83 (39%) inhibited N. gonorrhoeae growth. Two of these compounds were structurally dissimilar to existing antibiotics, maintained potency against multidrug-resistant N. gonorrhoeae strains in vitro, exhibited promising selectivity indices, and were rapidly bactericidal with low frequencies of resistance. Proteomic studies revealed their distinct mechanisms of action, with one compound targeting alanine racemase, an enzyme involved in the essential process of peptidoglycan synthesis. Furthermore, the compounds showed early promise in reducing N. gonorrhoeae titers in a human vagina-on-a-chip infection model and a mouse vaginal infection model. Our work establishes the deep learning-enabled discovery of selective antibacterial compounds against N. gonorrhoeae as a much-needed hit discovery tool to address the growing crisis of antimicrobial resistance for this pathogen.
top_papers.title_cn: 深度学习赋能抗淋病奈瑟菌抗生素的发现
top_papers.core_conclusion: 本研究利用图神经网络虚拟筛选数百万化合物，成功发现两种结构新颖且对多重耐药淋球菌高效的候选抗生素。
top_papers.detailed_analysis: 研究团队利用近4万个小分子的表型筛选数据训练了图神经网络模型，对约600万个化合物进行虚拟筛选。实验验证了筛选出的213个化合物，命中率高达39%，并锁定了2个结构全新、对多重耐药菌株有效且耐药率极低的候选分子。机制研究揭示其中一种分子靶向丙氨酸消旋酶，并在人体组织芯片和动物模型中证实了其杀菌疗效。该研究为应对日益严峻的淋球菌耐药危机提供了一种高效的AI药物发现新范式。
top_papers.clinical_insight: 虽然淋球菌感染多见于成人，但新生儿淋球菌性结膜炎仍是产科和儿科面临的棘手问题，且耐药株不断增加。AI加速发现的新型窄谱抗生素，未来有望为新生儿及儿童的特殊耐药感染提供更精准、副作用更小的治疗武器。

perspectives.clinical: 淋球菌耐药问题日益严重，临床正面临部分菌株无药可用的窘境。这项研究找出的新型窄谱抗生素不仅能精准杀灭多重耐药菌株，还能减少对正常菌群的破坏。未来这类新药一旦上市，将极大改善难治性淋病及新生儿感染的临床结局，降低并发症风险。
perspectives.trend: 图神经网络在分子生成上已趋于成熟，但复杂表型筛选仍需大量湿实验配合。本研究展示了AI虚拟筛选加高通量表型验证的闭环能力，大幅缩短了先导化合物的发现周期。未来两三年内，这种干湿结合的AI制药模式将成为对抗超级细菌的行业标配，推动更多新药进入临床。

top_papers.title: Zero-shot design of drug-binding proteins via neural iterative selection-expansion.
top_papers.abstract: The design of proteins that bind to small molecules has been challenging because it requires simultaneous optimization of the protein sequence, protein structure and ligand conformation1-7. Current deep-learning algorithms have struggled to navigate this landscape, precluding the zero-shot design of binders. Here we show that by combining two neural networks in an iterative design algorithm, small-molecule binding proteins can be created from scratch with high accuracy. We trained a graph neural network-ligand-aware sequence engineering message-passing neural network (LASErMPNN)-to design compatible protein sequences for an input protein backbone and docked ligand. We paired  LASErMPNN with a structure predictor that models a three-dimensional protein-ligand complex for an input protein sequence and ligand identity. The closed-loop iteration of these reciprocal networks optimized sequence-structure-ligand compatibility, and outperformed a comparable design loop using a physics-based energy function. We used our strategy, termed neural iterative selection-expansion (NISE), to design proteins that, using different folds, specifically bind to two chemically distinct small-molecule drugs, exatecan and apixaban, with success rates of 100% and 83%, respectively. The tightest NISE binders had nanomolar-to-picomolar affinities, surpassing those of the next-leading method by 70-fold for exatecan and nearly 10,000-fold for apixaban. LASErMPNN then suggested two amino-acid substitutions that improved the affinity of the tightest exatecan binder by 100-fold without any experimental input. The optimized binder protected the labile lactone ring of exatecan from hydrolysis for days. Our work describes a general recipe for using neural networks to automate the design of small-molecule binding proteins for applications in drug delivery, sensing and catalysis.
top_papers.title_cn: 通过神经迭代选择-扩展实现药物结合蛋白的零样本设计
top_papers.core_conclusion: 提出NISE算法，通过双网络闭环迭代，实现小分子药物结合蛋白的零样本从头设计，亲和力达皮摩尔级。
top_papers.detailed_analysis: 该研究开发了NISE策略，将序列设计网络与结构预测网络结合，通过闭环迭代同时优化蛋白序列、结构和配体构象。该方法成功从头设计了针对两种小分子药物的特异性结合蛋白，成功率高达83%至100%，且结合亲和力远超现有物理能量函数方法。AI还精准预测了氨基酸突变位点，使结合物亲和力提升百倍并有效保护药物结构免受水解。这为药物递送、生物传感和催化领域提供了通用的自动化蛋白设计范式。
top_papers.clinical_insight: 对小儿外科而言，这种能精准结合特定小分子并保护药物的定制蛋白，可用于开发靶向性更强、副作用更低的儿童肿瘤局部缓释递药系统。此外，基于该技术的生物传感器有望用于术中实时监测患儿体内的特定药物浓度或代谢物，提升围手术期精准用药水平。

perspectives.clinical: 这项技术让临床医生能按需定制精准抓取特定小分子药物的蛋白载体。未来我们有望为患儿设计出专属的局部缓释系统，在肿瘤原位精准释放化疗药，或在药物过量时快速中和毒性。它打破了传统蛋白药物研发的盲目性，让针对特定小分子的靶向治疗和术中药物浓度监测变得真正可行。
perspectives.trend: 该研究标志着AI蛋白设计从辅助优化正式迈入零样本从头创造的成熟期，解决了小分子结合蛋白设计的长期痛点。双网络闭环迭代机制证明了纯数据驱动模型在复杂三维构象优化上已展现出超越传统物理计算的巨大潜力。预计未来两到三年内，这类自动化设计平台将大幅降低新型生物药和诊断试剂的研发周期，重塑AI制药的行业格局。

brief_mentions.title: Towards autonomous medical artificial intelligence agents.
brief_mentions.one_line: 本文探讨了自主医疗AI智能体的架构与发展路径，旨在通过多智能体协作实现复杂临床任务的自动化与智能化决策。

brief_mentions.title: Health system learning enables generalist neuroimaging models.
brief_mentions.one_line: 研究通过整合多中心医疗系统数据，训练出具备强泛化能力的通用神经影像模型，显著提升了跨机构脑部疾病诊断的准确性。

brief_mentions.title: Clinical decision support in hematological malignancies using a case-grounded AI agent.
brief_mentions.one_line: 该研究开发了一种基于真实病例的AI智能体，能为血液恶性肿瘤患者提供精准的个性化临床决策支持，有效辅助医生制定治疗方案。

brief_mentions.title: Longitudinal Analysis of Changes in Deep Learning Image-based Breast Cancer Risk Scores over Time.
brief_mentions.one_line: 研究纵向追踪了基于深度学习的乳腺影像风险评分随时间的变化规律，发现其动态演变特征可为乳腺癌的早期精准预警提供新依据。

brief_mentions.title: Universal cell embedding provides a foundation model for cell biology.
brief_mentions.one_line: 本文构建通用细胞嵌入基础模型，统一表征多种细胞状态与功能，为解析复杂细胞生物学机制及疾病靶点发现提供了强大的计算工具。

brief_mentions.title: Large language models can predict the results of social science experiments.
brief_mentions.one_line: 研究证实大语言模型能准确预测社会科学实验结果，揭示了其在模拟人类行为与社会互动方面的巨大潜力，为社科研究提供新范式。

brief_mentions.title: Machine Learning Multiorgan Analysis of Coronary CT Angiography Body Composition, Myocardial Infarction, and Mortality in the SCOT-HEART Trial.
brief_mentions.one_line: 研究利用机器学习对冠脉CTA进行多器官成分分析，有效预测心梗与死亡风险，证实了该技术在心血管预后评估中的重要价值。

brief_mentions.title: The Ambulatory Surgery Center Paradox: Why 60% of Surgeries Occur Where 2% of AI Research Happens.
brief_mentions.one_line: 本文剖析门诊手术中心AI应用匮乏的悖论，指出数据孤岛与商业壁垒是阻碍该场景AI研发落地的核心原因，呼吁政策干预。

brief_mentions.title: Generative AI-enabled clinical decision support system in primary care: a pragmatic, cluster-randomized trial.
brief_mentions.one_line: 这项整群随机试验表明，生成式AI赋能的临床决策支持系统能显著提升初级保健医生的诊疗质量与效率，且未增加医疗安全风险。

brief_mentions.title: An ECG biomarker for sudden cardiac death discovered with deep learning.
brief_mentions.one_line: 研究利用深度学习从常规心电图中挖掘出新型生物标志物，实现了对心源性猝死风险的精准预测，为心血管疾病早期筛查提供新工具。

sections.section_summary: 重点：利用金属配位挖掘技术实现靶向酶发现... — 提出基于金属配位指导的策略，从结构数据库中成功挖掘出新型卤化酶，突破了传统序列比对的局限。

top_papers.title: Targeted enzyme discovery using metal-coordination mining.
top_papers.abstract: The recent revolution in genome sequencing and protein structure prediction has opened new frontiers in understanding, predicting and designing enzyme function1,2. Central to these efforts is the discovery and functional annotation of novel enzymes, which is essential for elucidating the connection between genotype and phenotype and for developing biocatalysts for industrial applications. However, accurately predicting enzymatic function remains a major challenge, and the discovery of new enzymes often relies on serendipity. Here we present a metal-coordination-guided strategy that uses atomic-level mechanistic principles to mine protein structure databases for the targeted discovery of metalloenzymes. We apply this framework to the AlphaFold2 Protein Structure Database to identify new members of the FeII/α-ketoglutarate-dependent halogenase family, which selectively functionalize unactivated C(sp3)-H-bonds, a crucial transformation in the production of pharmaceuticals and other high-value compounds3,4. These radical halogenases constitute a low-abundance class within the large and diverse cupin superfamily5. Owing to low sequence conservation, they have been especially challenging to find against the complex background of related family members, such as hydroxylases, desaturases and epimerases. Our metal-coordination mining methodology reveals several previously unrecognized radical halogenase families spanning diverse phylogenetic space, at minimal computational cost. Our predictions are validated by the experimental characterization of two new radical halogenases, AspX and BtnX. Notably, BtnX shows a substrate promiscuity that is unprecedented in radical halogenases, opening the way for a broad range of biocatalytic applications.
top_papers.title_cn: 利用金属配位挖掘技术实现靶向酶发现
top_papers.core_conclusion: 提出基于金属配位指导的策略，从结构数据库中成功挖掘出新型卤化酶，突破了传统序列比对的局限。
top_papers.detailed_analysis: 该研究开发了一种基于原子级金属配位机制的计算策略，直接在AlphaFold2蛋白结构数据库中靶向挖掘金属酶。针对序列保守性极低的卤化酶家族，该方法以极低计算成本发现了多个全新的进化分支。实验验证了新型卤化酶AspX和BtnX，其中BtnX展现出前所未有的底物杂泛性，为复杂药物分子的高效合成提供了全新生物催化剂。
top_papers.clinical_translation: 该研究挖掘新型金属酶的框架为临床药物代谢酶的功能注释提供了新思路，未来可能启发针对特定药物毒性机制的精准酶学干预。虽然直接用于临床治疗尚有距离，但作为新型靶向药物和复杂药物中间体的生物合成工具，已具备极高的临床转化潜力。

perspectives.basic: 该研究巧妙地将原子级金属配位机制引入蛋白质结构数据库挖掘，突破了传统依赖序列同源性的酶发现瓶颈。通过聚焦低丰度的卤化酶家族，成功在庞大的结构背景中精准定位了全新的进化分支。这不仅验证了基于结构特征的靶向挖掘策略的高效性，也为理解金属酶的催化机制与进化关系提供了重要理论支撑。
perspectives.clinical: 该成果发现的新型卤化酶具备极强的底物杂泛性，有望大幅缩短复杂药物中间体的合成路径并降低生产成本。从临床转化角度看，这种金属配位挖掘框架可平移至人类代谢酶的功能注释，从而助力新药研发与毒理评估。目前该技术距离临床直接应用尚有距离，主要受限于酶在生理环境中的稳定性，但作为药物合成工具已展现出巨大的转化潜力。

top_papers.title: Expansion and CAR engineering of granulocyte-monocyte progenitors for cellular immunotherapy.
top_papers.abstract: Engineered macrophages are promising for tumor immunotherapy but are limited by poor ex vivo expansion, genetic tractability, and biodistribution after transfer. Here, we develop defined culture conditions that enable long-term expansion of mouse and human granulocyte-monocyte progenitors (GMPs) while preserving progenitor identity and myeloid potential, establishing GMPs as a renewable engineering platform. Mechanistically, we identify myeloperoxidase as a regulator of GMP proliferation. Expanded GMPs are readily engineered and, after transfer, seed hematopoietic niches and generate donor-derived myelopoiesis that restores antibacterial defense in chronic granulomatous disease mice and yields abundant tumor-infiltrating macrophages. GMPs engineered with chimeric antigen receptors (CARs) suppress CD19-positive leukemia and human epidermal growth factor receptor 2 (HER2)-positive solid tumors. We further introduce a CAR incorporating an immunoglobulin G (IgG) Fc domain that recruits host Fc receptor-expressing phagocytes, enables T cell priming across major histocompatibility complex (MHC) mismatch, and enhances efficacy in immunocompetent allogeneic cancer models. Together, these findings establish expandable GMPs as a scalable platform for engineered immunotherapy.
top_papers.title_cn: 粒细胞-单核细胞祖细胞的体外扩增与CAR工程化用于细胞免疫治疗
top_papers.core_conclusion: 研究建立了可长期扩增的粒细胞-单核细胞祖细胞平台，通过CAR工程化实现对实体瘤和血液肿瘤的高效免疫治疗。
top_papers.detailed_analysis: 本研究突破了工程化巨噬细胞体外扩增和基因编辑的瓶颈，开发了维持GMP干性与髓系潜能的长期培养体系，并揭示髓过氧化物酶调控GMP增殖的新机制。回输后的工程化GMP能定植造血龛并持续产生髓系细胞，通过表达新型CAR及Fc结构域招募宿主免疫细胞，显著增强对肿瘤的杀伤效果。该研究为髓系细胞免疫治疗提供了一个具备自我更新能力、可规模化制备的全新细胞平台。
top_papers.clinical_translation: 这种具备自我更新能力的GMP-CAR平台，有望解决当前CAR细胞在儿童实体瘤治疗中持久性差和浸润不足的难题。同时，该疗法也为儿童慢性肉芽肿病等先天性免疫缺陷病提供了潜在的基因矫正与细胞替代治愈方案。距离临床转化仍需解决人源化GMP长期扩增的安全性及体内致瘤风险等关键障碍。
topic_tags: 粒细胞-单核细胞祖细胞

perspectives.basic: 该研究在方法学上实现了重大突破，成功建立了维持人类和小鼠GMP干性与髓系分化潜能的体外长期扩增体系。机制上首次鉴定出髓过氧化物酶是调控GMP增殖的关键因子，丰富了造血发育的理论认知。此外，通过引入IgG Fc结构域创新性地设计了新型CAR，巧妙利用宿主免疫细胞招募和T细胞致敏机制，显著拓展了髓系细胞免疫治疗的理论边界。
perspectives.clinical: GMP作为可自我更新的祖细胞，回输后能在体内长期定植并持续分化，有望彻底解决传统CAR-M细胞体内持久性差和实体瘤浸润不足的临床痛点。该策略不仅为HER2阳性等难治性实体瘤提供了新的治疗范式，还为慢性肉芽肿病等儿童先天性免疫缺陷病带来了基因治愈的希望。目前向临床转化的主要障碍在于需进一步验证人源GMP长期扩增的基因组稳定性及体内异位造血的安全风险。

top_papers.title: Diet-microbiome synergy underlies obesity-associated immunotherapy efficacy.
top_papers.abstract: Physiological host factors, such as the gut microbiome and obesity, independently influence anti-tumour immunity and responses to immune checkpoint inhibitors (ICIs)1, with high body mass index (BMI) having an unexpected link with greater ICI efficacy2-6. However, how these factors interact across diverse dietary contexts remains unclear. Here, using 12 mouse diet models that reflect a spectrum of obesity biology, we characterize diet-driven metabolic, immune and gut microbiota features associated with ICI sensitivity. We find that obesity-associated ICI responses are poorly correlated with metabolic dysfunction and are instead dependent on the diet-gut axis. Obesogenic diets promote a robust and persistent gut microbial ecosystem that is capable of restoring ICI sensitivity following a short-term diet switch or fecal microbiota transplants (FMTs) from non-responder models. Monocolonization of germ-free mice with favourable bacteria such as Lactobacillus johnsonii, together with an obesogenic diet, synergistically promotes tumour regression through an enrichment of microbiota-derived aromatic amino acid metabolites. Moreover, human-to-mouse FMT from donors with a high BMI enhanced ICI efficacy compared with donors with a normal BMI, and an obesogenic diet restored sensitivity following FMT from a non-responder patient. Our study provides insight on epidemiological associations between BMI and ICI efficacy, and suggests that immunomodulatory synergy between diet and the gut microbiota could be leveraged to improve ICI outcomes and FMT interventions.
top_papers.title_cn: 饮食与微生物组的协同作用决定了肥胖相关免疫治疗的疗效
top_papers.core_conclusion: 肥胖相关免疫治疗获益并非源于代谢紊乱，而是由致肥胖饮食与肠道菌群协同产生的芳香族氨基酸代谢物驱动。
top_papers.detailed_analysis: 研究利用12种小鼠饮食模型，揭示了高BMI与免疫检查点抑制剂疗效的关联主要依赖于饮食-肠道微生物轴而非单纯的代谢功能障碍。致肥胖饮食塑造了稳健的肠道菌群，能通过产生芳香族氨基酸代谢物协同促进肿瘤消退，且这种微生态特征可通过粪菌移植和短期饮食调整进行转移。人源化小鼠实验进一步证实，高BMI供体的粪菌移植结合致肥胖饮食能有效克服非响应者的耐药，为解释肥胖悖论提供了机制基础。
top_papers.clinical_translation: 该研究为通过饮食干预和粪菌移植优化肿瘤免疫治疗提供了直接依据，有望在1-3年内推动针对耐药患者的定制化营养与微生态联合疗法进入早期临床试验。未来可能改变晚期肿瘤患者的围治疗期管理，将特定饮食结构与活菌药物结合，成为提高免疫治疗响应率的标准辅助手段。

perspectives.basic: 本研究巧妙解构了肥胖与免疫治疗疗效之间的“肥胖悖论”，证实高BMI带来的获益并非源于系统性代谢紊乱，而是由特定饮食塑造的肠道微生态及其芳香族氨基酸代谢物所驱动。通过多饮食模型与无菌小鼠定植技术，研究精准锁定了约翰逊乳杆菌等关键菌株在协同抗肿瘤免疫中的核心作用。这一发现不仅重塑了对宿主生理因素调控肿瘤免疫的理论认知，也为解析饮食-微生物-免疫互作网络提供了方法学范式。
perspectives.clinical: 该研究为克服免疫检查点抑制剂耐药提供了极具前景的转化路径，表明通过短期饮食调整或粪菌移植重塑肠道菌群，即可有效逆转非响应者的耐药状态。高BMI供体粪菌移植与致肥胖饮食的协同效应，提示未来可开发基于特定代谢物或活菌药物的微生态免疫佐剂。尽管从动物模型到人类标准化干预仍需克服个体差异与代谢安全性等障碍，但该策略有望在近期推动营养-微生态联合疗法进入免疫治疗的临床试验阶段。

top_papers.title: Cuproptosis-immunity crosstalk informs strategy to overcome immunotherapy resistance.
top_papers.abstract: Cuproptosis is a recently identified form of copper-dependent cell death that depends on ferredoxin 1 (FDX1)-mediated protein lipoylation. Here, we reveal that CD8+ T cell-mediated antitumor immunity enhances tumor cell susceptibility to cuproptosis, leading to a more potent tumor-suppressive effect of cuproptosis inducers in immunocompetent hosts compared with immunodeficient ones. Mechanistically, cuproptotic tumor cells act as a form of immunogenic cell death, releasing damage-associated molecular patterns that activate dendritic cells and enhance antitumor immunity. Reciprocally, CD8+ T cell-derived interferon (IFN)-γ enhances FDX1 transcription in tumor cells by activating the signal transducer and activator of transcription 1 (STAT1)-IFN regulatory factor-1 (IRF1) signaling axis, resulting in heightened tumor cell sensitivity to cuproptosis. Consequently, combining a cuproptosis inducer with anti-programmed cell death ligand 1 (PD-L1) therapy amplifies tumoral cuproptosis and demonstrates efficacy in overcoming PD-L1 therapy resistance across multiple preclinical models. Our findings unveil a previously unrecognized connection between antitumor immunity and cuproptosis and highlight a potential therapeutic approach to counteract tumor immunotherapy resistance by targeting this unique cell death pathway.
top_papers.title_cn: 铜死亡与免疫的相互作用为克服免疫治疗耐药提供新策略
top_papers.core_conclusion: 研究揭示铜死亡与抗肿瘤免疫存在双向促进机制，联合铜死亡诱导剂与PD-L1抗体可有效克服免疫治疗耐药。
top_papers.detailed_analysis: 本研究首次阐明了CD8+ T细胞介导的抗肿瘤免疫与肿瘤细胞铜死亡之间的双向互作机制。一方面，铜死亡作为免疫原性细胞死亡可激活树突状细胞并增强抗肿瘤免疫；另一方面，T细胞分泌的IFN-γ通过STAT1-IRF1轴上调FDX1表达，使肿瘤细胞对铜死亡更敏感。基于此机制，研究提出将铜死亡诱导剂与抗PD-L1疗法联合使用，在多种临床前模型中成功逆转了免疫治疗耐药，为肿瘤治疗开辟了新路径。
top_papers.clinical_translation: 铜死亡诱导剂与免疫检查点抑制剂的联合应用有望成为破解实体瘤免疫耐药的新方案，但目前铜死亡诱导剂的肿瘤靶向性和系统性铜代谢毒性仍是临床转化的主要障碍。未来需开发更精准的铜递送系统或纳米药物，以在保障安全性的前提下实现临床转化。

perspectives.basic: 本研究在理论上取得了重要突破，首次揭示了铜死亡与抗肿瘤免疫之间存在精妙的双向正反馈环路。研究不仅证实了铜死亡具备免疫原性细胞死亡的特征，还深入解析了IFN-γ通过STAT1-IRF1-FDX1轴增敏铜死亡的分子机制。这一发现极大地丰富了细胞死亡与免疫微环境互作的理论内涵，为理解肿瘤免疫逃逸提供了全新的视角。
perspectives.clinical: 该研究为克服PD-L1免疫治疗耐药提供了极具潜力的联合用药策略，铜死亡诱导剂有望将免疫冷肿瘤转化为热肿瘤。然而，距离临床应用仍有距离，主要挑战在于现有铜死亡诱导剂缺乏肿瘤特异性，易引发全身铜代谢紊乱及毒副作用。未来需致力于开发靶向递送系统或前药策略，以精准调控肿瘤局部的铜死亡进程，从而推动其向临床转化。

top_papers.title: C1q and immunoglobulins mediate activity-dependent synapse loss in the adult brain.
top_papers.abstract: Complement component 1q (C1q), the initiator of the classical complement cascade, mediates synaptic elimination in development and disease, yet the triggers for its deposition on synapses remain unclear. Using in vivo chemogenetics, we demonstrate that neuronal hyperactivity induces region-specific, C1q-dependent synapse loss in the adult hippocampus. Suppressing perforant pathway hyperactivity in a mouse model of Alzheimer's disease reduced local amyloid-β amounts and C1q deposition and partially rescued synapse loss. Combining spatial transcriptomics, live cell tracking, and super-resolution microscopy, we identified association of antibody-secreting B-lineage cells in the adult hippocampus with activity-dependent, C1q-mediated synapse loss under physiological conditions. Together, these findings link neuronal hyperactivity to C1q-mediated synapse loss in the adult brain and implicate immunoglobulins as players in this process.
top_papers.title_cn: C1q和免疫球蛋白介导成年大脑中依赖活性的突触丢失
top_papers.core_conclusion: 神经元过度活跃通过触发免疫球蛋白和C1q沉积，介导成年大脑突触丢失及阿尔茨海默病病理进展。
top_papers.detailed_analysis: 本研究利用体内化学遗传学技术，证实神经元过度活跃会引发成年海马体区域特异性的C1q依赖性突触丢失。在阿尔茨海默病模型中，抑制异常活跃的神经通路可减少淀粉样蛋白沉积与C1q聚集，从而挽救突触。结合空间转录组与超分辨显微镜，研究首次揭示分泌抗体的B系细胞在生理及病理条件下通过免疫球蛋白参与该突触消除过程，为神经退行性疾病的免疫机制提供了新见解。
top_papers.clinical_translation: 该研究揭示了B细胞及免疫球蛋白在突触修剪中的关键作用，为阿尔茨海默病等神经退行性疾病提供了全新的免疫干预靶点。目前仍处于动物模型阶段，距离临床应用还需验证人类脑内是否存在相同的B细胞与突触互作机制，但未来有望催生针对脑内局部免疫微环境的靶向疗法。

perspectives.basic: 该研究突破了以往将C1q介导的突触修剪局限于发育期或单纯小胶质细胞吞噬的认知，揭示了成年大脑中神经元活性与适应性突触丢失的直接因果联系。通过巧妙结合化学遗传学与空间转录组学，研究精准定位了分泌抗体的B系细胞作为免疫球蛋白来源的关键角色，为理解神经免疫互作提供了方法学示范。这一发现不仅完善了经典补体级联反应在成年脑稳态中的理论框架，也为解析神经环路重塑的分子机制开辟了全新视角。
perspectives.clinical: 本研究将神经元过度活跃、脑内B细胞浸润与阿尔茨海默病的突触丢失直接挂钩，提示靶向脑内局部免疫反应或抑制特定神经通路过度兴奋可能成为延缓认知衰退的新策略。然而，血脑屏障的存在及脑内B细胞的确切来源与功能仍需进一步厘清，这构成了向临床转化的主要障碍。尽管距离开发靶向C1q或B细胞的脑内特异性药物尚需时日，但该发现为通过调节神经免疫微环境治疗神经退行性疾病提供了极具潜力的理论依据。

brief_mentions.title: Air-permeable hydrogels through viscoelastic phase separation of aerogels.
brief_mentions.one_line: 本研究利用气凝胶的粘弹性相分离技术，成功开发出具有高透气性的新型水凝胶材料，突破了传统水凝胶透气性差的瓶颈。

brief_mentions.title: Non-genotoxic transplantation and in vivo selection through epitope editing.
brief_mentions.one_line: 研究利用表位编辑技术实现非基因毒性的细胞移植与体内筛选，避免了传统基因编辑造成的基因损伤风险，显著提升了细胞治疗安全性。

brief_mentions.title: Patterning human kidney organoids with synthetic Wnt-secreting organizers.
brief_mentions.one_line: 研究利用合成的Wnt分泌型组织者对人心肾类器官进行空间图案化控制，精准模拟体内发育信号，显著提升了类器官的结构复杂性。

brief_mentions.title: Four-dimensional molecular mapping from a spatial snapshot reveals the dynamics of hair follicle organogenesis.
brief_mentions.one_line: 研究从空间快照中构建出四维分子图谱，揭示了毛囊发育过程中的动态分子变化规律，为理解复杂器官发生提供了全新的时空视角。

brief_mentions.title: Base editing reveals an essential role for NANOG in human embryogenesis.
brief_mentions.one_line: 研究利用碱基编辑技术证实了NANOG基因在人类早期胚胎发育中具有不可或缺的关键作用，深入揭示了人类胚胎发生的分子机制。

brief_mentions.title: Single-cell multiomics of neuron activation reveals context-specific genetics of brain disorders.
brief_mentions.one_line: 研究通过单细胞多组学分析神经元激活状态，揭示了脑疾病遗传风险具有特定的环境依赖性，为理解精神疾病发病机制提供了新见解。

brief_mentions.title: Zero-shot design of drug-binding proteins via neural iterative selection-expansion.
brief_mentions.one_line: 研究提出基于神经网络的零样本设计方法，通过迭代选择与扩展，高效构建出能特异性结合药物的新型蛋白质，加速靶向药物研发。

brief_mentions.title: An emergent disease-associated motor neuron state precedes cell death in ALS.
brief_mentions.one_line: 研究在肌萎缩侧索硬化症中发现一种新型疾病相关运动神经元状态，其出现于细胞死亡之前，为疾病的早期干预提供了潜在的新靶点。

brief_mentions.title: CD4+ T cells impair tumor growth through IL-3 and TNF-dependent vascular damage.
brief_mentions.one_line: 研究揭示CD4阳性T细胞通过释放白介素3和肿瘤坏死因子诱导血管损伤，进而抑制肿瘤生长，为癌症免疫治疗提供新视角。

brief_mentions.title: Lamprey 3D single-cell transcriptomics reveals ancestral and specialized features of the vertebrate brain.
brief_mentions.one_line: 研究利用七鳃鳗三维单细胞转录组技术，揭示了脊椎动物大脑的祖先与特化特征，为理解脊椎动物大脑的进化过程提供了重要线索。
